final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Basic SQS Queue for standard messaging workflows

Resources:
  SqsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for SQS queue encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SQS service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'

  BasicQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-basic-queue"
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 0
      KmsMasterKeyId: !GetAtt SqsEncryptionKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-queue"

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !Ref BasicQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue for IAM policies
    Value: !GetAtt BasicQueue.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-685c1973' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-685c1973: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SqsEncryptionKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SqsEncryptionKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'BasicQueue: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BasicQueue: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-685c1973: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']
latest_error_cfn-lint: None

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SNS Topic with email subscription for test notifications'

Resources:
  SnsEncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for SNS topic encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow admin access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: TestNotificationTopic
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Test

  NotificationTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
    Properties:
      TopicName: TestNotificationTopic
      DisplayName: Test Notifications
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SnsEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: TestNotificationTopic
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Test

  # Note: The email subscription enters "PendingConfirmation" status after deployment
  # and requires manual confirmation via the link sent to "test@test.com".
  EmailSubscription:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Subscription'
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref NotificationTopic
      Endpoint: test@test.com

Outputs:
  TopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS Topic for test notifications'
    Value: !Ref NotificationTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicArn'

  SubscriptionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Email Subscription'
    Value: !Ref EmailSubscription
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SubscriptionArn'
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-dcc13e58' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-dcc13e58: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SnsEncryptionKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SnsEncryptionKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'NotificationTopic: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'NotificationTopic: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'EmailSubscription: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'EmailSubscription: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-dcc13e58: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a secure Amazon S3 bucket with KMS encryption, versioning, public access blocks, and HTTPS enforcement following AWS best practices.

Resources:
  BucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for server-side encryption of ${AWS::StackName} S3 bucket'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:key/*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncryptFrom'
              - 'kms:ReEncryptTo'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKeyWithoutPlaintext'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringLike:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}/*'
              ForAllValues:StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-kms-key'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref BucketKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${Bucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BucketName"
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn"
  BucketDomainName:
    Description: Regional domain name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.RegionalDomainName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BucketDomainName"
  BucketKeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS key
    Value: !Ref BucketKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BucketKeyId"
  BucketKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key
    Value: !GetAtt BucketKey.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-BucketKeyArn"
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-f73c71e9' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-f73c71e9: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BucketKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BucketKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'Bucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'Bucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'BucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-f73c71e9: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']
latest_error_cfn-lint: [E3004] {'ColumnNumber': 3, 'LineNumber': 5}: Circular Dependencies for resource BucketKey. Circular dependency with [BucketKey]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure static website hosting using private S3 bucket with CloudFront OAC service principal authorization, customer-managed KMS encryption, versioning, full public access blocks enabled, WAF rate limiting, modern TLS, and Retain policies.

Resources:
  WebsiteBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: Customer managed KMS Key for S3 Website Bucket
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAdmin
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: AllowS3Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-website-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref WebsiteBucketKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  WebsiteWebACL:
    Type: AWS::WAFv2::WebACL
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-website-waf"
      Scope: CLOUDFRONT
      DefaultAction:
        Allow: {}
      VisibilityConfig:
        SampledRequestsEnabled: true
        CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
        MetricName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-waf"
      Rules:
        - Name: RateLimit
          Priority: 1
          Statement:
            RateBasedStatement:
              Limit: 2000
              AggregateKeyType: IP
          Action:
            Block: {}
          VisibilityConfig:
            SampledRequestsEnabled: true
            CloudWatchMetricsEnabled: true
            MetricName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rate-limit"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  WebsiteOAC:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::CloudFrontOriginAccessControl
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      OriginAccessControlOriginType: s3
      SigningBehavior: no-override
      SigningProtocol: sigv4
    Tags:
      - Key: Name
        Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
      - Key: Environment
        Value: Production

  WebsiteDistribution:
    Type: AWS::CloudFront::Distribution
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DistributionConfig:
        Enabled: true
        Origins:
          - Id: S3Origin
            DomainName: !Sub "${Bucket}.s3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
            S3OriginConfig:
              OriginAccessControlId: !Ref WebsiteOAC
        DefaultCacheBehavior:
          TargetOriginId: S3Origin
          ViewerProtocolPolicy: redirect-to-https
          AllowedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
            - OPTIONS
          CachedMethods:
            - GET
            - HEAD
          ForwardedValues:
            QueryString: false
            Cookies:
              Forward: none
          Compress: true
        DefaultRootObject: index.html
        CustomErrorResponses:
          - ErrorCode: 403
            ResponseCode: 200
            ResponsePagePath: /error.html
          - ErrorCode: 404
            ResponseCode: 200
            ResponsePagePath: /error.html
        ViewerCertificate:
          CloudFrontDefaultCertificate: true
          MinimumProtocolVersion: TLSv1.2_2021
        WebACLId: !Ref WebsiteWebACL
        PriceClass: PriceClass_100
        Comment: Static website distribution
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudFrontAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudfront.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:GetObjectVersion
            Resource: !Sub "${Bucket}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub
                  - "arn:aws:cloudfront::${AWS::AccountId}:distribution/${DistributionId}"
                  - DistributionId: !GetAtt WebsiteDistribution.Id

Outputs:
  WebsiteCloudFrontURL:
    Description: Secure public website endpoint
    Value: !Sub "https://${WebsiteDistribution.DomainName}/"
deploy_logs: None
latest_error_cfn-lint: None

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Deploys an EC2 instance with the latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI in a new VPC with public subnet and SSH access"

Parameters:
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Description: "Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to enable SSH access"
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: "t3.micro"
    Description: "EC2 instance type"
  SSHCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: "192.0.2.0/24"
    Description: "CIDR IP address range to allow SSH access from (IPv4)"

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  MyInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref MyInternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref MyInternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for EC2 instance allowing SSH"
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSecurityGroup"

  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      KeyName: !Ref KeyName
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          SecurityGroups:
            - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
          AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: "/dev/xvda"
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: "gp3"
            VolumeSize: 8
            Encrypted: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpTokens: "required"
        HttpEndpoint: "disabled"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EC2Instance"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: "Production"

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: "EC2 Instance ID"
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EC2InstanceId"
  PublicIp:
    Description: "Public IP of the EC2 Instance"
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PublicIp
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicIp"
  AZ:
    Description: "Availability Zone of the EC2 Instance"
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.AvailabilityZone
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-AZ"
deploy_logs: None
latest_error_cfn-lint: [E3002] {'ColumnNumber': 11, 'LineNumber': 96}: Additional properties are not allowed ('SecurityGroupIds' was unexpected)
latest_error_trivy: [AWS-0028] HIGH: aws_instance should activate session tokens for Instance Metadata Service. — Instance does not require IMDS access to require a token.

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: DynamoDB table for ArtistId, Concert, and TicketSales data with ArtistId as partition key and Concert as sort key for efficient queries.

Resources:
  ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: ArtistId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: Concert

        - AttributeName: ArtistId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: Concert
          KeyType: RANGE

      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: true
      ContributorInsightsSpecification:
        Enabled: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: The name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable
  TableArn:
    Description: The ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable.Arn
  ConsoleLink:
    Description: AWS Console link to the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Sub "https://${AWS::Region}.console.aws.amazon.com/dynamodb/home?region=${AWS::Region}#table/${ArtistConcertTicketSalesTable}"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a VPC with public subnet, Internet Gateway, public route table, Security Group allowing SSH inbound and all outbound, and an EC2 instance with public IP, UserData for updates and success signal.

Parameters:
  IngressCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: SSH access CIDR (update to YOUR.IP/32 for security)
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair for SSH access to the instance (leave empty to launch without key)
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    Description: EC2 instance type

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    DEFAULT:
      Path: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2

Conditions:
  UseKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub VPC-${AWS::StackName}

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub PublicSubnet-${AWS::StackName}

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub IGW-${AWS::StackName}

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub PublicRouteTable-${AWS::StackName}

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub Security group for EC2 instances in ${AWS::StackName}
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref IngressCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub EC2SecurityGroup-${AWS::StackName}

  MyLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-LaunchTemplate
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId:
          Fn::Sub:
            - '{{resolve:ssm:${Path}:1}}'
            - Path: !FindInMap [RegionMap, "DEFAULT", "Path"]
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !If [UseKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeType: gp2
              VolumeSize: 8
              Encrypted: true
              DeleteOnTermination: true
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: "required"
          HttpEndpoint: "enabled"
          HttpPutResponseHopLimit: 1
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            Groups:
              - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true

  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT15M
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref MyLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt MyLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp2
            VolumeSize: 8
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash -xe
          yum update -y
          /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal --exit-code 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource EC2Instance --region ${AWS::Region}

Outputs:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a secure EC2 instance (t3.micro) with AWS Systems Manager (SSM) Session Manager for remote management, without open SSH/RDP ports. Uses region-specific Amazon Linux 2 AMIs.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a313d6098716f372
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0ef806961332486f6
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0d95806ff5e4a6dec
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0fe8c98a1753b3cc5

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Minimal security group for SSM-managed EC2 instance (no inbound, outbound HTTPS for SSM)'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SG'

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LT'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: 'required'
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: '0'
            SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash -xe
            yum install -y aws-cfn-bootstrap
            systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
            sleep 60
            /opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource Instance --region ${AWS::Region}
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Instance'
              - Key: Environment
                Value: demo
              - Key: Purpose
                Value: ssm-managed-ec2

  Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignalTimeout: PT10M
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: '/dev/xvda'
          Ebs:
            Encrypted: true
            VolumeType: 'gp3'
            VolumeSize: 8
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Instance'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: demo
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ssm-managed-ec2
    DependsOn:
      - VPCGatewayAttachment
      - PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance ID
    Value: !Ref Instance
  PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP of the EC2 Instance
    Value: !GetAtt Instance.PublicIp
  SSMInstanceArn:
    Description: SSM Managed Instance ARN
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:managed-instance/${Instance}'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to create an EC2 instance with ephemeral drives attached using block device mappings, latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI via SSM Parameter Store, SSH key pair, and security group in a pre-existing default VPC/subnet.'

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: 'The ID of the pre-existing VPC (e.g., default VPC).'
  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: 'The ID of the pre-existing subnet in the VPC.'
  AllowedCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Description: 'CIDR block allowed for inbound SSH traffic (specify a restricted range).'

Resources:
  InstanceKeyPair:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair
    Properties:
      KeyFormat: pem
      KeyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-KeyPair'
      KeyType: rsa
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceKeyPair'

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EC2 instance SSH access'
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedCidrBlock
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceSecurityGroup'

  InstanceLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        RootDeviceName: /dev/xvda
        ImageId: resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
        InstanceType: m5d.4xlarge
        KeyName: !Ref InstanceKeyPair
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeType: gp2
              VolumeSize: 8
              DeleteOnTermination: true
              Encrypted: true
          - DeviceName: /dev/sdb
            VirtualName: ephemeral0
          - DeviceName: /dev/sdc
            VirtualName: ephemeral1
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
            Groups:
              - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceWithEphemeral'

  InstanceWithEphemeral:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref InstanceLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt InstanceLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: 'ID of the created EC2 instance.'
    Value: !Ref InstanceWithEphemeral
  PublicIpAddress:
    Description: 'Public IP address of the EC2 instance for SSH access.'
    Value: !GetAtt InstanceWithEphemeral.PublicIp
  KeyPairName:
    Description: 'Name of the created EC2 KeyPair.'
    Value: !Ref InstanceKeyPair
  KeyFingerprint:
    Description: 'Fingerprint of the created EC2 KeyPair.'
    Value: !GetAtt InstanceKeyPair.KeyFingerprint
deploy_logs: None
latest_error_cfn-lint: None

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'DynamoDB table for mobile notifications reporting with GSI on type and sentTime, pay-per-request billing, TTL auto-expiry, SSE-KMS, and PITR enabled.'

Resources:
  DynamoDBEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} DynamoDB encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnableIAMUserPermissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowDynamoDBService
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'dynamodb.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
              - 'kms:Encrypt'
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:ReEncrypt*'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DeriveSharedSecret'
            Resource: '*'
  NotificationsTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MobileNotifications-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: sentTime
          AttributeType: N
        - AttributeName: type
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: notificationId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: sentTime
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: TypeSentTimeIndex
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: type
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: sentTime
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL
      SSESpecification:
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: !GetAtt DynamoDBEncryptionKey.Arn
        SSEEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: MobileNotificationsReporting

Outputs:
  NotificationsTableName:
    Description: The name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref NotificationsTable
  TypeSentTimeIndexName:
    Description: The name of the Global Secondary Index
    Value: TypeSentTimeIndex
  NotificationsTableArn:
    Description: The ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt NotificationsTable.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instance with EIP and SSH access in default VPC/subnet

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: String
    Description: ID of the default VPC
  SubnetId:
    Type: String
    Description: ID of the default subnet
  KeyName:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName'
    Description: EC2 Key Pair name for SSH access, required
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
  SSHCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Default: '203.0.113.1/32'
    Description: CIDR for SSH inbound access (e.g., 203.0.113.1/32), must not be 0.0.0.0/0
    AllowedPattern: '^(?=.*[0-9]).{7,18}$'
    MinLength: 7
    MaxLength: 18

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AMI: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      AMI: ami-0a0ad6b70e61be944
    us-west-1:
      AMI: ami-0d1bcd46272230fc5
    us-west-2:
      AMI: ami-0be2609ba883822ec
    eu-west-1:
      AMI: ami-063df112bfe4b15a9

Resources:
  SSHSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSH-SG'
  SSHInboundRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref SSHSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 22
      ToPort: 22
      CidrIp: !Ref SSHCidrBlock
  MyElasticIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
  MyLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !Ref KeyName
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref SSHSecurityGroup
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              Encrypted: true
              VolumeSize: 8
              VolumeType: gp3
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: "required"
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate: !Ref MyLaunchTemplate
      SubnetId: !Ref SubnetId
    DependsOn:
      - SSHSecurityGroup
      - MyLaunchTemplate
  EIPAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt MyElasticIP.AllocationId
      InstanceId: !Ref MyEC2Instance

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: ID of the EC2 Instance
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
  PublicIPAddress:

    Value: !Ref SSHSecurityGroup

    us-west-2:

    ap-northeast-1:
      AMI: ami-0d4a68e232f4952dc

Conditions:
  UseKeyName: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:

    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

    Properties:

    Properties:

      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']

      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:

    Properties:

      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-InstanceRole'

    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref InstanceRole

  WebServerInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AMI]

      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref WebServerSecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      KeyName: !If [UseKeyName, !Ref KeyName, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      DisableApiTermination: true
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp3
            DeleteOnTermination: true
            Encrypted: true
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          MIME-Version: 1.0
          Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="==MYBOUNDARY==="
          --==MYBOUNDARY===
          Content-Type: text/cloud-config; charset="us-ascii"
          #cloud-config
          runcmd:
          - /opt/aws/bin/cfn-init -v --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource WebServerInstance --region ${AWS::Region} --configsets InstallAndRunApache
          --==MYBOUNDARY===--
    Metadata:
      AWS::CloudFormation::Init:
        configSets:
          InstallAndRunApache:
            - config:
                packages:
                  yum:
                    httpd: []
                files:
                  /var/www/html/index.html:
                    mode: '000644'
                    owner: root
                    group: root
                    content: !Sub |
                      Hello, World!
                      Powered by CloudFormation on ${AWS::StackName} - ${AWS::StackId}
                  /etc/cfn/cfn-hup.conf:
                    mode: '000644'
                    owner: root
                    group: root
                    content: !Sub |-
                      [main]
                      stack=${AWS::StackName}
                      region=${AWS::Region}
                      :UseEfs=false
                  /etc/cfn/hooks.d/cfn-auto-reloader.conf:
                    mode: '000755'
                    owner: root
                    group: root
                    content: !Sub |
                      #!/bin/bash
                      /opt/aws/bin/cfn-init -v --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource WebServerInstance --region ${AWS::Region}
                services:
                  systemd:
                    cfn-hup:
                      enabled: true
                      ensureRunning: true
                    httpd:
                      enabled: true
                      ensureRunning: true
                      files:
                        - /var/www
                        - /etc/httpd/conf
                commands:
                  SignalResource:
                    command: !Sub '/opt/aws/bin/cfn-signal -e 0 --stack ${AWS::StackName} --resource WebServerInstance --region ${AWS::Region}'
    CreationPolicy:
      ResourceSignal:
        Timeout: PT5M
        MinSuccessfulInstances: 1
    DependsOn: PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: Instance ID of the web server
    Value: !Ref WebServerInstance
  PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP of the web server
    Value: !GetAtt WebServerInstance.PublicIp
  WebsiteURL:
    Description: Web server URL
    Value: !Sub 'http://${WebServerInstance.PublicIp}'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for a single ENI with two EIPs and secondary private IPs, enabling a single EC2 instance to handle multiple public-facing IP addresses through one network interface.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-IGW"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet

  ENISecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ENI
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ENISG"

  ENI:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkInterface
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Description: ENI for multi-public IP support on single EC2 instance
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10
      PrivateIpAddresses:
        - PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.11
          Primary: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ENI"

  EIP1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EIP1"

  EIPAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.10

  EIP2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EIP2"

  EIPAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIPAssociation
    Properties:
      NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref ENI
      PrivateIpAddress: 10.0.1.11

Outputs:
  ENINetworkInterfaceId:
    Description: NetworkInterfaceId of the ENI
    Value: !Ref ENI
  PrimaryPrivateIpAddress:
    Description: Primary Private IP Address of the ENI
    Value: !GetAtt ENI.PrimaryPrivateIpAddress
  SecondaryPrivateIpAddress:
    Description: Secondary Private IP Address of the ENI
    Value: !Select [0, !GetAtt ENI.SecondaryPrivateIpAddresses]
  EIP1PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP Address of EIP1
    Value: !Ref EIP1
  EIP2PublicIp:
    Description: Public IP Address of EIP2
    Value: !Ref EIP2
  EIPAssociation1Id:
    Description: Association ID for EIP1
    Value: !Ref EIPAssociation1
  EIPAssociation2Id:
    Description: Association ID for EIP2
    Value: !Ref EIPAssociation2

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for API Gateway REST API with Lambda non-proxy integration

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  MyLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              headers: {
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
              },
              body: JSON.stringify("Hello from Lambda!")
            };
          };

  MyRestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MyRestApi
      Description: My API Gateway REST API
      BinaryMediaTypes: []

  RootGetMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      ResourceId: !GetAtt MyRestApi.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${MyLambdaFunction.Arn}/invocations"

  MyLambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref MyLambdaFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${MyRestApi}/*/*"

  MyDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
    DependsOn: RootGetMethod

  MyStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MyRestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref MyDeployment
      StageName: prod

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: API Gateway endpoint URL for prod stage
    Value: !Sub "https://${MyRestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to deploy AWS Glue Database and Crawler for cataloging CloudTrail logs in S3, enabling structured querying via Athena.'

Parameters:
  DatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: cloudtrail_db
    Description: Name of the Glue Database
  CrawlerName:
    Type: String
    Default: cloudtrail_crawler
    Description: Name of the Glue Crawler
  S3Path:
    Type: String
    Default: s3://kk-admin/cloud-trail/AWSLogs/
    Description: S3 path containing CloudTrail logs

Resources:
  GlueCrawlerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: GlueCrawlerRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3AccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetBucketLocation
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !Sub
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}'
                    - BucketName: !Select
                        - '2'
                        - !Split
                          - '/'
                          - !Ref S3Path
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:GetObjectVersion
                Resource:
                  - !Sub
                    - 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}/*'
                    - BucketName: !Select
                        - '2'
                        - !Split
                          - '/'
                          - !Ref S3Path
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CloudTrailGlueCrawler
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'

  CloudTrailDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref DatabaseName
        Description: Database for CloudTrail logs cataloged by Glue Crawler

  CloudTrailCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref CrawlerName
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      Description: Crawler for CloudTrail logs in S3
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Ref S3Path
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: UPDATE_IN_DATABASE
        DeleteBehavior: LOG
      RecrawlPolicy:
        RecrawlBehavior: CRAWL_EVENT_MODE
      TablePrefix: cloudtrail_
      Configuration: '{"Version":1.0,"CrawlerOutput":{"Partitions":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"InheritFromTable"},"Tables":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"MergeNewColumns"}}}'
      Tags:
        Project: CloudTrailGlueCrawler
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
    DependsOn: 
      - CloudTrailDatabase

Outputs:
  DatabaseName:
    Description: Name of the Glue Database for Athena querying of CloudTrail logs
    Value: !Ref DatabaseName
  CrawlerName:
    Description: Name of the Glue Crawler for managing CloudTrail log metadata
    Value: !Ref CrawlerName
  GlueCrawlerRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the IAM Role used by the Glue Crawler
    Value: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for multi-threshold AWS billing alarms using CloudWatch and SNS. Monitors EstimatedCharges metric with 6-hour evaluation periods ($5, $10, $20, $40 thresholds), sending email alerts on breaches and resolutions.'

Parameters:
  EmailEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: xxxxx@gmail.com
    Description: Email address for billing alerts (requires manual confirmation after deployment)
  Currency:
    Type: String
    Default: USD
    Description: Currency for billing metric dimensions

Resources:
  BillingKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: CMK for SNS billing alerts encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable root
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'

  BillingKMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${AWS::StackName}-BillingSNSEncryptionKey'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref BillingKMSKey

  BillingAlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: AWS Billing Threshold Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref BillingKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  BillingSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailEndpoint
      TopicArn: !Ref BillingAlertsTopic

  BillingAlarm5Dollars:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Triggers when estimated monthly charges exceed $5 USD
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: !Ref Currency
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Statistic: Maximum
      Threshold: 5.0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      OKActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  BillingAlarm10Dollars:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Triggers when estimated monthly charges exceed $10 USD
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: !Ref Currency
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Statistic: Maximum
      Threshold: 10.0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      OKActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  BillingAlarm20Dollars:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Triggers when estimated monthly charges exceed $20 USD
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: !Ref Currency
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Statistic: Maximum
      Threshold: 20.0
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      OKActions:
        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: BillingMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  BillingAlarm40Dollars:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Triggers when estimated monthly charges exceed $40 USD
      Namespace: AWS/Billing
      MetricName: EstimatedCharges
      Dimensions:
        - Name: Currency
          Value: !Ref Currency
      Period: 21600
      EvaluationPeriods: 1

        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic

        - !Ref BillingAlertsTopic

      Tags:

        - Key: Environment

Outputs:

  BillingSubscriptionArn:

    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BillingSubscriptionArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for integrating DynamoDB streams with EventBridge via Pipes to automate event-driven workflows based on specific data changes, such as when a user's avatarUrl ends with .png.

Parameters:
  TableName:
    Type: String
    Default: UserAvatarsTable
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
  BusName:
    Type: String
    Default: AvatarEventsBus
    Description: Name of the custom EventBridge EventBus
  PipeName:
    Type: String
    Default: DynamoDBToEventBridgePipe
    Description: Name of the EventBridge Pipe
  SourceName:
    Type: String
    Default: avatar.updates
    Description: Source value for events sent to EventBus
  DetailType:
    Type: String
    Default: AvatarPngUpdated
    Description: DetailType value for events sent to EventBus

Resources:
  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${TableName}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: userId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: userId
          KeyType: HASH
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      StreamSpecification:
        StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DynamoDB-EventBridge-Integration

  CustomEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${BusName}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DynamoDB-EventBridge-Integration

  PipesExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: PipesExecutionRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:pipes:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:pipes/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PipesExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                  - dynamodb:ListStreams
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:dynamodb:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:table/${TableName}/stream/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:PutEvents
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:event-bus/${BusName}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DynamoDB-EventBridge-Integration

  DynamoDBEventBridgePipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${PipeName}'
      Source: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.StreamArn
      RoleArn: !GetAtt PipesExecutionRole.Arn
      Target: !GetAtt CustomEventBus.Arn
      TargetParameters:
        EventBridgeEventBusParameters:
          Source: !Ref SourceName
          DetailType: !Ref DetailType
      Tags:
        Project: DynamoDB-EventBridge-Integration

  PngAvatarFilterRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref CustomEventBus
      Name: !Sub '${PipeName}-PngFilterRule'
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        dynamodb:
          - NewImage:
              - avatarUrl:
                  - S:
                      - suffix:
                          - .png
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DynamoDB-EventBridge-Integration

Outputs:
  DynamoDBTableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB Table for integration reference
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBTable
  DynamoDBTableArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB Table for integration reference
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.Arn
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBus for troubleshooting and integration reference
    Value: !GetAtt CustomEventBus.Arn
  PipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Pipe for troubleshooting and integration reference
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBEventBridgePipe.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudWatch Dashboard and Logs Insights Queries for AWS Client VPN Usage Monitoring

Parameters:
  ClientVPNLogGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/clientvpn/connections
    Description: The CloudWatch Logs group for Client VPN connection logs
  AuthLogGroupName:
    Type: String
    Default: /aws/clientvpn/auth
    Description: The CloudWatch Logs group for Client VPN authentication logs
  DashboardName:
    Type: String
    Default: ClientVPN-Monitoring-Dashboard
    Description: Base name for the CloudWatch Dashboard
  AnalysisPeriod:
    Type: String
    Default: P7D
    Description: ISO8601 duration for analysis period in queries (e.g., P7D for 7 days)

Resources:
  EndpointsUsageQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub ClientVPN/Endpoints/UsageTable-${AWS::StackName}
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, clientVpnEndpointId as endpointId, connectionDurationSeconds as duration, bytesIn, bytesOut
        | stats count() as Connections, avg(duration)/60 as AvgDurationMin, sum(bytesIn)/1024/1024/1024 as IngressGB, sum(bytesOut)/1024/1024/1024 as EgressGB by endpointId
        | sort IngressGB desc
        | limit 20
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName

  DistinctUsersQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub ClientVPN/Users/DistinctUsersTable-${AWS::StackName}
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, username
        | stats count_distinct(username) as DistinctUsers, count() as TotalConnections by bin(24h)
        | fields DistinctUsers, TotalConnections, if(DistinctUsers > 0, round(TotalConnections / DistinctUsers), 0) as AvgConnsPerUser
        | sort TotalConnections desc
        | limit 20
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName

  TopDataTransferQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub ClientVPN/Users/TopDataTransfer-${AWS::StackName}
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, username, bytesIn, bytesOut
        | stats sum(bytesIn + bytesOut)/1024/1024/1024 as TotalGB by username
        | sort TotalGB desc
        | limit 20
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName

  ADSAMLBreakdownQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub ClientVPN/Auth/AD-SAML-Breakdown-${AWS::StackName}
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, username, status
        | filter username like /@domain/ or status = "authenticated"
        | stats count() as Connections, count_distinct(username) as Users by bin(24h)
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref AuthLogGroupName

  MutualAuthBreakdownQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub ClientVPN/Auth/MutualAuth-Breakdown-${AWS::StackName}
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, commonName, status
        | filter commonName like /CN=/ and ispresent(commonName)
        | stats count() as Connections, count_distinct(commonName) as Certs by bin(24h)
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref AuthLogGroupName

  MixedAuthBreakdownQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub ClientVPN/Auth/MixedAuth-Breakdown-${AWS::StackName}
      QueryString: |
        fields @timestamp, username, commonName
        | stats
          count() as Total,
          sum(if(!ispresent(username), 1, 0)) as MutualOnly,
          sum(if(!ispresent(commonName), 1, 0)) as FederatedOnly
        by bin(24h)
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName

  AggregateMetricsQuery:
    Type: AWS::Logs::QueryDefinition
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub ClientVPN/Overview/AggregateMetrics-${AWS::StackName}
      QueryString: !Sub |
        filter @timestamp > now() - ${AnalysisPeriod}
        | fields @timestamp, bytesIn, bytesOut, connectionDurationSeconds
        | stats sum(bytesIn)/1024/1024/1024 as TotalIngressGB, sum(bytesOut)/1024/1024/1024 as TotalEgressGB, avg(connectionDurationSeconds)/60 as AvgDurationMin, count() as TotalConnections
      LogGroupNames:
        - !Ref ClientVPNLogGroupName

  ClientVPNMonitoringDashboard:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Dashboard
    Properties:
      DashboardName: !Sub ${DashboardName}-${AWS::StackName}
      DashboardBody: !Sub |
        {
          "widgets": [
            {
              "type": "text",
              "properties": {
                "markdown": "# Client VPN Monitoring Dashboard\\n**Aggregate Metrics | Endpoint Usage | User Activity | Auth Breakdowns**",
                "backgroundColor": "#CRT-text-background",
                "height": 1,
                "width": 24,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 0
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "metric",
              "properties": {
                "metrics": [
                  [ "AWS/ClientVPN", "BytesIn", "ClientVpnEndpointId", "*" ],
                  [ ".", "BytesOut", ".", "*" ]
                ],
                "view": "timeSeries",
                "stacked": false,
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "title": "Aggregate Data Transfer (All Endpoints)",
                "start": "${AnalysisPeriod}",
                "period": 3600,
                "height": 6,
                "width": 12,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 1,
                "refreshRate": 5
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "metric",
              "properties": {
                "metrics": [
                  [ "AWS/ClientVPN", "ActiveClientConnections", "ClientVpnEndpointId", "*" ]
                ],
                "view": "timeSeries",
                "stacked": true,
                "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                "title": "Active Client Connections (All Endpoints)",
                "start": "${AnalysisPeriod}",
                "period": 300,
                "height": 6,
                "width": 12,
                "x": 12,
                "y": 1,
                "refreshRate": 5
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "text",
              "properties": {
                "markdown": "## Endpoint Usage",
                "backgroundColor": "#lightgray",
                "height": 1,
                "width": 24,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 7
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "properties": {
                "title": "Endpoint-Specific Usage: Connections, Duration, Ingress/Egress",
                "logQuery": {
                  "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "queryId": "${EndpointsUsageQuery.QueryDefinitionId}"
                },
                "view": "table",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "height": 8,
                "width": 24,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 8,
                "refreshRate": 5
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "text",
              "properties": {
                "markdown": "## User Activity",
                "backgroundColor": "#lightgray",
                "height": 1,
                "width": 24,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 16
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "properties": {
                "title": "Distinct Users & Connections",
                "logQuery": {
                  "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "queryId": "${DistinctUsersQuery.QueryDefinitionId}"
                },
                "view": "table",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "height": 6,
                "width": 12,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 17,
                "refreshRate": 5
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "properties": {
                "title": "Top Users by Data Transfer",
                "logQuery": {
                  "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "queryId": "${TopDataTransferQuery.QueryDefinitionId}"
                },
                "view": "table",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "height": 6,
                "width": 12,
                "x": 12,
                "y": 17,
                "refreshRate": 5
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "text",
              "properties": {
                "markdown": "## Authentication Breakdowns",
                "backgroundColor": "#lightgray",
                "height": 1,
                "width": 24,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 23
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "properties": {
                "title": "AD-SAML Auth Breakdown",
                "logQuery": {
                  "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "queryId": "${ADSAMLBreakdownQuery.QueryDefinitionId}"
                },
                "view": "table",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "height": 6,
                "width": 8,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 24,
                "refreshRate": 5
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "properties": {
                "title": "Mutual Auth Breakdown",
                "logQuery": {
                  "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "queryId": "${MutualAuthBreakdownQuery.QueryDefinitionId}"
                },
                "view": "table",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "height": 6,
                "width": 8,
                "x": 8,
                "y": 24,
                "refreshRate": 5
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "log",
              "properties": {
                "title": "Mixed Auth Breakdown",
                "logQuery": {
                  "accountId": "${AWS::AccountId}",
                  "region": "${AWS::Region}",
                  "queryId": "${MixedAuthBreakdownQuery.QueryDefinitionId}"
                },
                "view": "table",
                "start": "P1D",
                "end": "P0D",
                "height": 6,
                "width": 8,
                "x": 16,
                "y": 24,
                "refreshRate": 5
              }
            },
            {
              "type": "text",
              "properties": {
                "markdown": "*Auth Inference: Federated (AD/SAML) - username@domain or status=authenticated | Mutual - CN= in commonName | Mixed - combinations of username/commonName*",
                "backgroundColor": "#E8F4FD",
                "height": 1,
                "width": 24,
                "x": 0,
                "y": 30
              }
            }
          ]
        }

Outputs:
  DashboardUrl:
    Description: URL of the ClientVPN Monitoring Dashboard
    Value: !Sub "https://console.aws.amazon.com/cloudwatch/home?region=${AWS::Region}#dashboards:name=${ClientVPNMonitoringDashboard}"
  QueryDefinitionIds:
    Description: IDs of all created Logs Insights QueryDefinitions
    Value: !Join ["\n", [
      !Sub "EndpointsUsageQueryId: ${EndpointsUsageQuery.QueryDefinitionId}",
      !Sub "DistinctUsersQueryId: ${DistinctUsersQuery.QueryDefinitionId}",
      !Sub "TopDataTransferQueryId: ${TopDataTransferQuery.QueryDefinitionId}",
      !Sub "ADSAMLBreakdownQueryId: ${ADSAMLBreakdownQuery.QueryDefinitionId}",
      !Sub "MutualAuthBreakdownQueryId: ${MutualAuthBreakdownQuery.QueryDefinitionId}",
      !Sub "MixedAuthBreakdownQueryId: ${MixedAuthBreakdownQuery.QueryDefinitionId}",
      !Sub "AggregateMetricsQueryId: ${AggregateMetricsQuery.QueryDefinitionId}"
    ]]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "Configurable Amazon Timestream database and tables with differentiated retention policies and CloudWatch alarms for error handling. Note: Timestream resources enter maintenance mode 2025-06-20; monitor AWS for migration to Timestream for LiveAnalytics."

Parameters:
  DatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: poc-timestream-db
    Description: Name of the Timestream database
  DefaultMemoryHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    Description: Default memory store retention in hours
  DefaultMagneticDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 7
    Description: Default magnetic store retention in days
  MemOnlyHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    Description: Memory-only retention in hours for older records table
  LongMagneticDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365
    Description: Long magnetic store retention in days for older records table
  AlarmThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    Description: Threshold for alarm triggering
  KmsKeyId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional KMS Key ID for database encryption
  SnsTopicArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Optional SNS Topic ARN for alarm notifications

Conditions:
  UseKms: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KmsKeyId, '']]
  UseSns: !Not [!Equals [!Ref SnsTopicArn, '']]

Resources:
  TimestreamDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Database  # cfn-lint: ignore=W3697
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref DatabaseName
      KmsKeyId: !If [UseKms, !Ref KmsKeyId, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${DatabaseName}-TimestreamDatabase"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: poc

  BatchWriteTable:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table  # cfn-lint: ignore=W3697
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref TimestreamDatabase
      TableName: poc-table-01-batch-write
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref DefaultMemoryHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref DefaultMagneticDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${DatabaseName}-poc-table-01-batch-write"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: poc

  MemOnlyTable:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table  # cfn-lint: ignore=W3697
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref TimestreamDatabase
      TableName: poc-table-02-older-records-memonly
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref MemOnlyHours
      MagneticStoreWriteProperties:
        EnableMagneticStoreWrites: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${DatabaseName}-poc-table-02-older-records-memonly"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: poc

  MagneticTable:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table  # cfn-lint: ignore=W3697
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref TimestreamDatabase
      TableName: poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref DefaultMemoryHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref LongMagneticDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${DatabaseName}-poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: poc

  CommonAttributesTable:
    Type: AWS::Timestream::Table  # cfn-lint: ignore=W3697
    Properties:
      DatabaseName: !Ref TimestreamDatabase
      TableName: poc-table-04-common-attributes
      RetentionProperties:
        MemoryStoreRetentionPeriodInHours: !Ref DefaultMemoryHours
        MagneticStoreRetentionPeriodInDays: !Ref DefaultMagneticDays
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${DatabaseName}-poc-table-04-common-attributes"
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Ref 'AWS::StackName'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: poc

  FailedWritesAlarm01:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alarm for failed writes on poc-table-01-batch-write
      Namespace: AWS/Timestream
      MetricName: FailedWrites
      Dimensions:
        - Name: DatabaseName
          Value: !Ref DatabaseName
        - Name: TableName
          Value: poc-table-01-batch-write
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      OKActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  FailedWritesAlarm02:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alarm for failed writes on poc-table-02-older-records-memonly
      Namespace: AWS/Timestream
      MetricName: FailedWrites
      Dimensions:
        - Name: DatabaseName
          Value: !Ref DatabaseName
        - Name: TableName
          Value: poc-table-02-older-records-memonly
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      OKActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  FailedWritesAlarm03:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alarm for failed writes on poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic
      Namespace: AWS/Timestream
      MetricName: FailedWrites
      Dimensions:
        - Name: DatabaseName
          Value: !Ref DatabaseName
        - Name: TableName
          Value: poc-table-03-older-records-magnetic
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      OKActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  FailedWritesAlarm04:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alarm for failed writes on poc-table-04-common-attributes
      Namespace: AWS/Timestream
      MetricName: FailedWrites
      Dimensions:
        - Name: DatabaseName
          Value: !Ref DatabaseName
        - Name: TableName
          Value: poc-table-04-common-attributes
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      OKActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  ThrottledWritesAlarm01:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmDescription: Alarm for throttled writes on poc-table-01-batch-write
      Namespace: AWS/Timestream
      MetricName: WriteThrottle
      Dimensions:
        - Name: DatabaseName
          Value: !Ref DatabaseName
        - Name: TableName
          Value: poc-table-01-batch-write
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      AlarmActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      OKActions: !If [UseSns, [!Ref SnsTopicArn], []]
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  ThrottledWritesAlarm02:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
