final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: DynamoDB Table with LSI and GSI

Parameters:
  TableNameParam:
    Type: String
    Default: MyTable
    Description: Prefix for the unique DynamoDB table name
  BillingMode:
    Type: String
    Default: PAY_PER_REQUEST
    AllowedValues:
      - PROVISIONED
      - PAY_PER_REQUEST
    Description: Billing mode for the table and GSIs
  ReadCapacityUnits:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    Description: Read capacity units when using PROVISIONED mode
  WriteCapacityUnits:
    Type: Number
    Default: 5
    Description: Write capacity units when using PROVISIONED mode

Conditions:
  ProvisionedMode: !Equals [!Ref BillingMode, PROVISIONED]

Resources:
  DynamoDBTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${TableNameParam}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}"
      BillingMode: !Ref BillingMode
      ProvisionedThroughput:
        Fn::If:
          - ProvisionedMode
          - ReadCapacityUnits: !Ref ReadCapacityUnits
            WriteCapacityUnits: !Ref WriteCapacityUnits
          - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: PK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: SK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: LSI_SK
          AttributeType: N
        - AttributeName: GSI_PK
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: GSI_SK
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: PK
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: SK
          KeyType: RANGE
      LocalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: LSI1Index
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: PK
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: LSI_SK
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: KEYS_ONLY
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: GSI1Index
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: GSI_PK
              KeyType: HASH
            - AttributeName: GSI_SK
              KeyType: RANGE
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: KEYS_ONLY
          ProvisionedThroughput:
            Fn::If:
              - ProvisionedMode
              - ReadCapacityUnits: !Ref ReadCapacityUnits
                WriteCapacityUnits: !Ref WriteCapacityUnits
              - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      TableClass: STANDARD
      DeletionProtectionEnabled: false
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
        SSEType: KMS
        KMSMasterKeyId: alias/aws/dynamodb
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref TableNameParam
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBTable
  TableArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB table
    Value: !GetAtt DynamoDBTable.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys an IoT data pipeline that routes messages from the device/data MQTT topic in AWS IoT Core to an SQS queue via SNS pub/sub intermediary. Includes DLQ handling, CloudWatch Logs for message logging, IAM role with least-privilege permissions, and production best practices.'
Resources:
  SqsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} SQS queues SSE'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  SnsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for ${AWS::StackName} SNS topic SSE'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
            Action: '*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQ'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsKey
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  DataQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataQueue'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsKey
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      RedrivePolicy: !Sub '{ "deadLetterTargetArn":"${DeadLetterQueue.Arn}", "maxReceiveCount":1 }'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  IoTDataTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTDataTopic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SnsKey
      DisplayName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTDataTopic'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  DeviceDataLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/iot/${AWS::StackName}-device-data-logs'
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  IoTRuleRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTRuleRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: iot.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTRulePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref IoTDataTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:SendMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: !Sub '${DeviceDataLogGroup.Arn}:*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
  SqsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref IoTDataTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt DataQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      RedrivePolicy: !Sub '{ "deadLetterTargetArn":"${DeadLetterQueue.Arn}" }'
  DeviceDataRule:
    Type: AWS::IoT::TopicRule
    Properties:
      RuleName: !Sub 'DeviceDataRule${AWS::AccountId}'
      TopicRulePayload:
        Sql: "SELECT * FROM 'device/data'"
        Description: 'Routes device/data messages to SNS topic with logging and error handling to DLQ'
        Actions:
          - Sns:
              RoleArn: !GetAtt IoTRuleRole.Arn
              TargetArn: !Ref IoTDataTopic
          - CloudwatchLogs:
              LogGroupName: !Ref DeviceDataLogGroup
              RoleArn: !GetAtt IoTRuleRole.Arn
        ErrorAction:
          Sqs:
            QueueUrl: !Ref DeadLetterQueue
            RoleArn: !GetAtt IoTRuleRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: IoTDataPipeline
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
Outputs:
  DataQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the main SQS data queue
    Value: !Ref DataQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataQueueUrl'
  DataQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the main SQS data queue
    Value: !GetAtt DataQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataQueueArn'
  IoTDataTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref IoTDataTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IoTDataTopicArn'
  DeviceDataRuleName:
    Description: Name of the IoT Topic Rule
    Value: !Ref DeviceDataRule
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DeviceDataRuleName'
  SqsSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS to SQS subscription
    Value: !Ref SqsSubscription
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SqsSubscriptionArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket integrated with EventBridge and SNS to notify on object creation events.'

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for S3 bucket encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 SSE'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  SNSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for SNS topic encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS SSE'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-bucket-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      NotificationConfiguration:
        EventBridgeConfiguration:
          EventBridgeEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: ForceSSL
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ObjectCreatedTopic'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SNSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  EventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgeSNSPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  EventBridgeRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Description: 'EventBridge rule to capture S3 Object Created events and publish to SNS'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.s3
        'detail-type':
          - 'Object Created (All)'
        resources:
          - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Arn: !Ref SNSTopic
          Id: SNSTarget
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  TopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS topic'
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  RuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the EventBridge rule'
    Value: !GetAtt EventBridgeRule.Arn

Description: 'Real-time data ingestion and storage pipeline using Amazon Kinesis Data Stream, Kinesis Data Firehose, and S3 bucket.'

Parameters:

    Type: Number
    Default: 24
  FirehoseBufferSizeInMBs:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 128
  FirehoseBufferIntervalInSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 900
  S3Prefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'data/'
  S3ErrorPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'errors/'
  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''

Resources:
  PipelineBucketKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for S3 SSE-KMS'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'RootAccess'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'S3Access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 's3.amazonaws.com'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PipelineBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DependsOn: PipelineBucketKMSKey
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-${BucketNameSuffix}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
        - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
            SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
            KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref PipelineBucketKMSKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PipelineBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref PipelineBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFirehoseDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource:
              - !Sub '${PipelineBucket.Arn}/${S3Prefix}*'
              - !Sub '${PipelineBucket.Arn}/${S3ErrorPrefix}*'

  FirehoseRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref AWS::StackName
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchLogsFullAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: KinesisReadPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:DescribeStream
                  - kinesis:GetShardIterator
                  - kinesis:GetRecords
                  - kinesis:ListShards
                  - kinesis:SubscribeToShard
                Resource: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
        - PolicyName: S3WritePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectTagging
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt PipelineBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${PipelineBucket.Arn}/*'
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    's3:prefix':
                      - !Sub '${S3Prefix}*'
                      - !Sub '${S3ErrorPrefix}*'
        - PolicyName: S3KMSPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Decrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey*
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !GetAtt PipelineBucketKMSKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  DataStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DataStream'
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref RetentionPeriodHours
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  FirehoseDeliveryStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      KinesisStreamSourceConfiguration:
        KinesisStreamARN: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
      ExtendedS3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt PipelineBucket.Arn
        BufferingHints:
          IntervalInSeconds: !Ref FirehoseBufferIntervalInSeconds
          SizeInMBs: !Ref FirehoseBufferSizeInMBs
        CompressionFormat: GZIP
        Prefix: !Ref S3Prefix
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
        ProcessingConfiguration:
          Enabled: false
        S3BackupMode: Enabled
        S3BackupConfiguration:
          BucketARN: !GetAtt PipelineBucket.Arn
          RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
          CompressionFormat: GZIP
          Prefix: !Ref S3ErrorPrefix
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/kinesis-firehose/${AWS::StackName}-Firehose'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

Outputs:
  DataStreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !Ref DataStream
  DataStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Stream
    Value: !GetAtt DataStream.Arn
  FirehoseDeliveryStreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream
    Value: !Ref FirehoseDeliveryStream
  FirehoseDeliveryStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseDeliveryStream.Arn
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 Bucket
    Value: !Ref PipelineBucket

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Automated monitoring and notification system for AWS Secrets Manager secret
  lifecycle events, which sends alerts via Amazon SNS when secrets are created,
  updated, or accessed.

Resources:
  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: secrets-manager-alerts-key
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  KMSAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/secrets-manager-alerts-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey

  SecretsLifecycleAlertsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DisplayName: Secrets Manager Lifecycle Alerts
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref KMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  EventBridgeSecretsSNSPublishRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SecretsSNSPublishPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SecretsLifecycleAlertsTopic
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !GetAtt KMSKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerMonitoring
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SecretsLifecycleEventsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      State: ENABLED
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.secretsmanager
        'detail-type':
          - AWS API Call via CloudTrail
        detail:
          eventName:
            - CreateSecret
            - UpdateSecret
            - GetSecretValue
      Targets:
        - Id: SNSTarget
          Arn: !Ref SecretsLifecycleAlertsTopic
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeSecretsSNSPublishRole.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              'eventName': '$.detail.eventName'
              'name': '$.detail.requestParameters.name'
              'secretArn': '$.detail.responseElements.arn'
              'userIdentity': '$.detail.userIdentity'
              'timestamp': '$.time'
            InputTemplate: |
              {
                "subject": "Secrets Manager Alert: <eventName> on secret <name>",
                "message": {
                  "eventName": "<eventName>",
                  "secretName": "<name>",
                  "secretArn": "<secretArn>",
                  "userIdentity": <userIdentity>,
                  "timestamp": "<timestamp>"
                }
              }

Outputs:
  SecretsLifecycleAlertsTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SecretsLifecycleAlertsTopic SNS Topic
    Value: !Ref SecretsLifecycleAlertsTopic
  SecretsLifecycleEventsRuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Rule capturing Secrets Manager lifecycle events
    Value: !Ref SecretsLifecycleEventsRule
  SecretsManagerAlertsKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS Key used for SNS server-side encryption
    Value: !Ref KMSKey

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Secure parameter storage and retrieval for serverless apps using SSM and Secrets Manager"

Resources:
  ExampleConfigParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/example-config"
      Type: String
      Value: "This is A/B"
      Description: "Non-sensitive configuration value for demo"

  AppSettingParam:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/app-setting"
      Type: String
      Value: "demo-serverless-value"

  AppSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-AppSecret"
      Description: "Secure credentials for serverless app"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username": "admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        PasswordLength: 20
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\'
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
        IncludeSpace: false
      Tags:
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "SecureConfigManagement"

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaExecutionRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMAndSecretsAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParametersByPath
                Resource: "*"
                Condition:
                  StringLike:
                    "ssm:Path": !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:GetParameter
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:ssm:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:parameter//${AWS::StackName}/config/*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${AppSecret}"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "SecureConfigManagement"

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ConfigRetriever"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os
          import logging

          logger = logging.getLogger()
          logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

          def handler(event, context):
              ssm_client = boto3.client('ssm')
              secrets_client = boto3.client('secretsmanager')
              namespace = os.environ['PARAM_NAMESPACE']
              secret_name = os.environ['SECRET_NAME']
              try:
                  response = ssm_client.get_parameters_by_path(
                      Path=namespace,
                      Recursive=True,
                      WithDecryption=True
                  )
                  logger.info(f"Retrieved SSM parameters: {json.dumps(response, default=str)}")
                  secret_response = secrets_client.get_secret_value(SecretId=secret_name)
                  logger.info(f"Retrieved secret: {secret_response['SecretString']}")
              except Exception as e:
                  logger.error(f"Error: {str(e)}")
                  raise e
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Success')
              }
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Environment:
        Variables:
          PARAM_NAMESPACE: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/"
          SECRET_NAME: !Ref AppSecret
      Tags:
        - Key: "Stack"
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: "Purpose"
          Value: "SecureConfigManagement"
    DependsOn:
      - ExampleConfigParam
      - AppSettingParam

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: "Lambda for fetching SSM params and Secrets"
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaFunction.Arn
  SecretArn:
    Description: "Secrets Manager secret ARN"
    Value: !Sub "arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:${AppSecret}"
  Namespace:
    Description: "Stack-specific config path"
    Value: !Sub "/${AWS::StackName}/config/"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a private MySQL RDS instance (db.r5.large with io1 storage) within a dedicated VPC across two private subnets in different AZs with network isolation.'

Parameters:
  VPCCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  PrivateSubnetACIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
  PrivateSubnetBCIDR:

    Type: String
    Default: admin

    Type: String
    Default: 'SecureRDS8Pass123!'

    MinLength: '8'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Password must be at least 8 characters long.'
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydatabase
  AllocatedStorage:
    Type: Number

    MinValue: 100

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:

      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetA'

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnetBCIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetB'

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'

  SubnetRouteTableAssociationA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociationB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  VPCNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateNACL'

  EphemeralInboundNACLRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref VPCNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 50
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false

  EphemeralInboundUDPNACLRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref VPCNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 60
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false

  InboundRDSPortNACLRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref VPCNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 90
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      Egress: false

  OutboundEphemeralTCPNACLRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref VPCNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 50
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      Egress: true

  OutboundEphemeralUDPNACLRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref VPCNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 60
      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: !Ref VPCCIDR
      Egress: true

  InboundDenyAllNACLRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref VPCNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 32766
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: false

  OutboundDenyAllNACLRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref VPCNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 32766
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      Egress: true

  SubnetNACLAssociationA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      NetworkAclId: !Ref VPCNetworkAcl

  SubnetNACLAssociationB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      NetworkAclId: !Ref VPCNetworkAcl

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySQLDBSubnetGroup'
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: 'DB Subnet Group for MySQL RDS'
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySQLDBSubnetGroup'

  RDSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'MySQL RDS Security Group'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !Ref VPCCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySQLRDSecurityGroup'

  MasterPasswordSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDS-MasterSecret'
      SecretString: !Sub '{"username":"${MasterUsername}","password":"${MasterUserPassword}"}'

  DBInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-MySQL'
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: '8.0.45'
      DBInstanceClass: db.r5.large
      AllocatedStorage: !Ref AllocatedStorage
      StorageType: io1
      Iops: !Ref Iops
      MasterUserSecret: !Ref MasterPasswordSecret
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSecurityGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      MultiAZ: true
      StorageEncrypted: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      PreferredBackupWindow: !Ref PreferredBackupWindow
      DeletionProtection: true

Outputs:
  RDSEndpoint:
    Description: 'MySQL RDS Endpoint Address'
    Value: !Sub '${DBInstance.Endpoint.Address}:${DBInstance.Endpoint.Port}'
  DBSubnetGroupName:
    Description: 'DB Subnet Group Name'
    Value: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
  VPCId:
    Description: 'VPC ID'
    Value: !Ref VPC
  MasterPasswordSecretArn:
    Description: 'Secrets Manager ARN for RDS credentials'
    Value: !Ref MasterPasswordSecret

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a privately accessible MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.small) with automated snapshots enabled in a VPC with two public subnets across Availability Zones, including Internet Gateway and route table. Pre-create SSM SecureString parameter named 'MyRDSMasterPassword' before deploying. RDS is not publicly accessible; use VPC peering, VPN, or bastion for external connectivity.

Parameters:
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydb
    MinLength: '1'
    MaxLength: '64'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$'
    ConstraintDescription: 1-64 letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen. Start and end with alphanumeric.
  MasterUsername:
    Type: String
    Default: 'admin'
    MinLength: '1'
    MaxLength: '16'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]{0,15}$'
    ConstraintDescription: 1-16 alphanumeric characters. First character must be a letter.

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: RDSVPC
        - Key: Project
          Value: PublicRDSMySQL
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PublicRDSMySQL
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  GatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PublicRDSMySQL
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: GatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select: [0, {Fn::GetAZs: ''}]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PublicRDSMySQL
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select: [1, {Fn::GetAZs: ''}]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PublicRDSMySQL
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  RDSSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS MySQL instance allowing inbound 3306 from anywhere and all outbound traffic
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PublicRDSMySQL
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for RDS instance across two public subnets in different AZs
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PublicRDSMySQL
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

  RDSInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DependsOn: GatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-mysql-db'
      DBInstanceClass: db.t3.small
      Engine: mysql
      EngineVersion: 8.0.45
      MasterUsername: !Ref MasterUsername
      MasterUserPassword: '{{resolve:ssm-secure:MyRDSMasterPassword}}'
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      AllocatedStorage: 20
      StorageType: gp2
      StorageEncrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: alias/aws/rds
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref RDSSecurityGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DeletionProtection: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PublicRDSMySQL
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Dev

Outputs:
  VPCID:
    Description: ID of the VPC hosting the RDS instance and networking resources
    Value: !Ref VPC

  RDSEndpointAddress:
    Description: Endpoint address of the MySQL RDS instance for client connections
    Value: !GetAtt RDSInstance.Endpoint.Address

  DBSubnetGroupName:
    Description: Name of the DB Subnet Group used by the RDS instance
    Value: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Deploys a secure MySQL RDS instance (db.t3.micro) with custom parameter group, network isolation in a private VPC, and AWS Secrets Manager for admin credentials."

Parameters:
  DBName:
    Type: String
    Default: mydb
    Description: "The name of the initial database to create"
  KMSKeyId:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Optional ARN of a KMS key for RDS to access the Secrets Manager secret (leave empty for default)"

Conditions:
  UseCustomKMS: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KMSKeyId, ""]]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-rt"

  PrivateRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  NetworkACL:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-nacl"

  InboundAllow:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      PortRange:
        From: 3306
        To: 3306
      Egress: false

  InboundDeny:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 32767
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      Egress: false

  OutboundAllow:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: true

  OutboundDeny:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL
      RuleNumber: 32767
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: deny
      CidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      Egress: true

  SubnetNaclAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL

  SubnetNaclAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref NetworkACL

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Private subnets for RDS"
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-dbsubnetgroup"

  DBParameterGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBParameterGroup
    Properties:
      Family: "mysql8.0"
      DBParameterGroupName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-mysql-params"
      Description: "Custom MySQL 8.0 parameters for UTF-8 support"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-mysql-params"

  RDSSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-admin-secret"
      Description: "Managed RDS admin credentials"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "password"
        PasswordLength: 20
        RequireEachIncludedType: true
        ExcludeCharacters: '"@/\\'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rds-admin-secret"

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub "Security group for ${AWS::StackName} RDS MySQL"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: "tcp"
          FromPort: "3306"
          ToPort: "3306"
          CidrIp: "10.0.0.0/16"
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: "-1"
          CidrIp: "10.0.0.0/16"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-db-sg"

  MySQLDB:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-mysql"
      DBInstanceClass: "db.t3.micro"
      Engine: "mysql"
      EngineVersion: "8.0.45"
      AllocatedStorage: "20"
      StorageType: "gp2"
      StorageEncrypted: true
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref DBSubnetGroup
      VPCSecurityGroups:
        - !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      DBParameterGroupName: !Ref DBParameterGroup
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      DeletionProtection: true
      BackupRetentionPeriod: 7
      DBName: !Ref DBName
      MasterUserSecret:
        SecretArn: !Ref RDSSecret
        KmsKeyId: !If [UseCustomKMS, !Ref KMSKeyId, !Ref AWS::NoValue]

Outputs:
  EndpointAddress:
    Description: "RDS MySQL Endpoint Address"
    Value: !GetAtt MySQLDB.Endpoint.Address
  SecretArn:
    Description: "Secrets Manager Secret ARN for RDS admin credentials"
    Value: !Ref RDSSecret
  VpcId:
    Description: "VPC ID"
    Value: !Ref VPC
  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: "Private Subnet IDs"
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure S3 deployment with replica storage bucket and access logging bucket

Resources:
  ReplicaBucketKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for ReplicaBucket SSE-KMS encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'

  AccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  AccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogsBucket}/logs/*'
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ReplicaBucket}'
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AccessLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  ReplicaBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ReplicaBucketKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ReplicaBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ReplicaBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyInsecureTransport
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ReplicaBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  ReplicaBucketName:
    Description: Name of the Replica Bucket
    Value: !Ref ReplicaBucket
  ReplicaBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the Replica Bucket
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicaBucket.Arn

    Description: Name of the Access Logs Bucket
    Value: !Ref AccessLogsBucket
  AccessLogsBucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the Access Logs Bucket
    Value: !GetAtt AccessLogsBucket.Arn
  ReplicaBucketKeyArn:
    Description: ARN of the KMS Key for ReplicaBucket
    Value: !GetAtt ReplicaBucketKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates an S3 bucket with server-side encryption, versioning, public access blocked, and a Lambda function triggered on s3:ObjectCreated:* events.'

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'cfn-s3-trigger-bucket'
    Description: 'Unique name for the S3 bucket'
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'cfn-trigger-lambda'
    Description: 'Name for the Lambda function'
  LambdaRuntime:
    Type: String
    Default: nodejs20.x
    Description: 'Runtime for the Lambda function'
  LambdaHandler:
    Type: String
    Default: index.handler
    Description: 'Handler for the Lambda function'

Resources:
  S3EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket server-side encryption'
      Enabled: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowS3Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'

  TriggerLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunctionName
      Runtime: !Ref LambdaRuntime
      Handler: !Ref LambdaHandler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 30
      MemorySize: 128
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            console.log('Received S3 event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
            return { statusCode: 200, body: 'Processed' };
          };

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DependsOn: TriggerLambdaFunction
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref BucketName
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3EncryptionKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Function: !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:${LambdaFunctionName}'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  LambdaS3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: LambdaS3AccessPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref LambdaExecutionRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: !GetAtt S3EncryptionKey.Arn

  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref TriggerLambdaFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
      SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

Outputs:
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket'
    Value: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt TriggerLambdaFunction.Arn
  LambdaFunctionName:
    Description: 'Name of the Lambda function'
    Value: !Ref TriggerLambdaFunction
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-80eebbd5' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-80eebbd5: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaExecutionRole: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaExecutionRole: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'TriggerLambdaFunction: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'TriggerLambdaFunction: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'S3EncryptionKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3EncryptionKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'S3Bucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3Bucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaInvokePermission: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaInvokePermission: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'LambdaS3AccessPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'LambdaS3AccessPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'S3BucketPolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3BucketPolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-80eebbd5: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'ECR Repository with root access policy for Kubernetes container image management'

Parameters:

    Type: String
    Default: 'ecr-repo'
    AllowedPattern: '^(?=.{2,256}$)([a-z0-9]+((\\.|_|__|-+)[a-z0-9]+)*(\\/[a-z0-9]+((\\.|_|__|-+)[a-z0-9]+)*)*)$'

        ScanOnPush: true
      EncryptionConfiguration:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KmsKey: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/aws/ecr'
      RepositoryPolicyText: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2008-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
              },
              "Action": [
                "ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability",
                "ecr:BatchDeleteImage",
                "ecr:BatchGetImage",
                "ecr:CompleteLayerUpload",
                "ecr:DeleteRepository",
                "ecr:DeleteRepositoryPolicy",
                "ecr:DescribeImages",
                "ecr:DescribeRepositories",
                "ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer",
                "ecr:GetRepositoryPolicy",
                "ecr:InitiateLayerUpload",
                "ecr:ListImages",
                "ecr:PutImage",
                "ecr:SetRepositoryPolicy",
                "ecr:UploadLayerPart"
              ],
              "Condition": {
                "Bool": {
                  "aws:SecureTransport": "true"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref RepositoryName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a secure SQS FIFO Queue with deduplication and encryption.

Parameters:
  QueueNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MyFifoQueue

Resources:
  SQSQueueCMK:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Enabled: true
      Description: CMK for SQS FIFO Queue
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSQSEncryption
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'

  MyFifoQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${QueueNamePrefix}.fifo'
      FifoQueue: true
      ContentBasedDeduplication: true
      DeduplicationScope: "queue"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SQSQueueCMK
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref QueueNamePrefix
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MyFifoQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt MyFifoQueue.Arn
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: sqs:*
            Resource: !GetAtt MyFifoQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS FIFO Queue
    Value: !GetAtt MyFifoQueue.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a secure SQS Standard queue.'

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: 'dev'
    Description: 'Environment for tagging'
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
    Description: 'Message retention period in seconds (default 4 days, max 14 days)'
  AllowedVpcIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: ''
    Description: 'List of VPC IDs allowed to access the queue'
  AllowedPrincipalArns:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: ''
    Description: 'List of IAM principal ARNs allowed to access the queue'

Resources:
  SqsEncryptionKey:
    Type: 'AWS::KMS::Key'
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for SQS Standard queue encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Enable root access'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS service use'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              Service: 'sqs.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey*'
              - 'kms:DescribeKey'
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:sqs:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${AWS::StackName}-standard-queue'

  StandardQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-standard-queue'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: 'Name'
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-standard-queue'
        - Key: 'Environment'
          Value: !Ref Environment

  QueueAccessPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy'
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref StandardQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'AllowAccessFromAllowedVPCs'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
              - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
              - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
              - 'sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility'
            Resource: !GetAtt StandardQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceVpc': !Ref AllowedVpcIds
          - Sid: 'AllowAccessFromSpecificPrincipals'
            Effect: 'Allow'
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref AllowedPrincipalArns
            Action:
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
              - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
              - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
              - 'sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility'
            Resource: !GetAtt StandardQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: 'URL of the SQS queue'
    Value: !Ref StandardQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SQS queue'
    Value: !GetAtt StandardQueue.Arn
  QueueName:
    Description: 'Name of the SQS queue'
    Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-standard-queue'
  KmsKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of CMK used for queue encryption'
    Value: !GetAtt SqsEncryptionKey.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Multi-AZ VPC with two public subnets across two Availability Zones and one private subnet in AZ2, using static RegionMap for fixed AZ selection to prevent resource shifting on AZ changes.'

Mappings:
  RegionMap:
    us-east-1:
      AZ1: us-east-1a
      AZ2: us-east-1b
    us-east-2:
      AZ1: us-east-2a
      AZ2: us-east-2b
    us-west-2:
      AZ1: us-west-2a
      AZ2: us-west-2b
    eu-west-1:
      AZ1: eu-west-1a
      AZ2: eu-west-1b
    eu-central-1:
      AZ1: eu-central-1a
      AZ2: eu-central-1b
    ap-southeast-1:
      AZ1: ap-southeast-1a
      AZ2: ap-southeast-1b

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ1]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ2]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !FindInMap [RegionMap, !Ref 'AWS::Region', AZ2]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicInternetRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPCId'

  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID (AZ1)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1Id'

  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID (AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2Id'

  PrivateSubnetId:
    Description: Private Subnet ID (AZ2)
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetId'

  PublicRouteTableId:
    Description: Public Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTableId'

  PrivateRouteTableId:
    Description: Private Route Table ID
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for a secure S3 bucket with integrated AWS KMS encryption, lifecycle management, versioning, public access blocks, and organizational tags.'
Resources:
  EncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for S3 bucket encryption
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Allow root access
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 service principal
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
  MyKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: alias/my-s3-encryption-key
      TargetKeyId: !Ref EncryptionKey
  SecureBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-secure-bucket-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
        - ApplyServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
            KMSMasterKeyID: !GetAtt EncryptionKey.Arn
            SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: StandardToIA
            Status: Enabled
            Transitions:
              - StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
                TransitionInDays: 60
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
                NoncurrentVersionTransitionInDays: 30
          - Id: ExpireVersions
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 365
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: 90
          - Id: ToGlacier
            Status: Enabled
            NoncurrentVersionTransitions:
              - StorageClass: GLACIER
                NoncurrentVersionTransitionInDays: 180
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SecureDataBucket
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Owner
          Value: InfrastructureTeam
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EncryptedStorage
  SecureBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref SecureBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyUnencryptedUploads
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub '${SecureBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEqualsIfExists:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': aws:kms
              ArnNotEqualsIfExists:
                's3:x-amz-kms-key-id': !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/my-s3-encryption-key'
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the secure S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref SecureBucket
  KeyId:
    Description: ID of the KMS encryption key
    Value: !Ref EncryptionKey
  KeyAlias:
    Description: ARN of the KMS key alias
    Value: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/my-s3-encryption-key'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose Delivery Stream with S3 destination, server-side encryption, and CloudWatch error logging.

Resources:
  FirehoseS3KmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket server-side encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow S3 service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'

  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-firehose-bucket-${AWS::Region}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FirehoseS3KmsKey
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true

  FirehoseLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/kinesis-firehose/${AWS::StackName}-errors'
      RetentionInDays: 14
      KmsKeyId: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/aws/logs'

  FirehoseLogStream:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogStream
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
      LogStreamName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-error-stream'

  FirehoseRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: firehose.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FirehosePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                  - s3:PutObjectTagging
                Resource: !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:PutRetentionPolicy
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt FirehoseLogGroup.Arn
                  - !Sub '${FirehoseLogGroup.Arn}:*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kms:Encrypt
                  - kms:GenerateDataKey
                  - kms:DescribeKey
                Resource: !GetAtt FirehoseS3KmsKey.Arn

  FirehoseStream:
    Type: AWS::KinesisFirehose::DeliveryStream
    Properties:
      DeliveryStreamName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-firehose-stream'
      S3DestinationConfiguration:
        BucketARN: !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
        RoleARN: !GetAtt FirehoseRole.Arn
        Prefix: data/
        ErrorOutputPrefix: errors/
        CompressionFormat: GZIP
        BufferingHints:
          IntervalInSeconds: 400
          SizeInMBs: 128
        CloudWatchLoggingOptions:
          Enabled: true
          LogGroupName: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
          LogStreamName: !Ref FirehoseLogStream
      DeliveryStreamEncryptionConfigurationInput:
        KeyType: AWS_OWNED_CMK

Outputs:
  FirehoseStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Data Firehose delivery stream
    Value: !GetAtt FirehoseStream.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FirehoseStreamArn'
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket used as Firehose destination
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'
  LogGroupName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Log Group for Firehose error logging
    Value: !Ref FirehoseLogGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogGroupName'
  LogStreamName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Log Stream for Firehose error logging
    Value: !Ref FirehoseLogStream
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LogStreamName'
