AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for tiered FIS IAM roles with granular permissions - SecurityAdmin (full access), Admin (non-prod), User (limited actions, non-prod), NonUser (deny FIS).

Parameters:
  WorkshopRolePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: WorkshopServiceRole
  ProdTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
  MFAExternalId:
    Type: String
    Default: MFAExternalId
    Description: External ID required for assuming these roles (use MFA).

Resources:
  FISSecurityAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityAdmin'
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: true
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref MFAExternalId
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService: fis.amazonaws.com
        - PolicyName: FISFullAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - fis:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - iam:CreateServiceLinkedRole
                Resource: '*'

  FISAdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Admin'
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: true
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref MFAExternalId
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService: fis.amazonaws.com
        - PolicyName: FISAdminAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - fis:*
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:ResourceTag/Environment': !Ref ProdTagValue

  FISUserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-User'
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: true
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref MFAExternalId
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService: fis.amazonaws.com
        - PolicyName: FISUserAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - fis:GetExperiment*
                  - fis:List*
                  - fis:StartExperiment
                  - fis:StopExperiment
                  - fis:TagResource
                  - fis:UntagResource
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - fis:*
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    'aws:ResourceTag/Environment': !Ref ProdTagValue

  FISNonUserRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NonUser'
      Path: /
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              Bool:
                aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: true
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref MFAExternalId
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/ReadOnlyAccess
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConditionalPassRoleToFIS
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: iam:PassRole
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${WorkshopRolePrefix}*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService: fis.amazonaws.com
        - PolicyName: FISDenyAll
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - fis:*
                Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  FISSecurityAdminRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the FIS Security Admin role (full FIS access, create service-linked roles, workshop role passing)
    Value: !GetAtt FISSecurityAdminRole.Arn

    Description: ARN of the FIS Non-User role (read-only AWS access, deny all FIS, workshop role passing)
    Value: !GetAtt FISNonUserRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for environment-specific DynamoDB tables to store supporter product data (PROD: provisioned with auto-scaling; CODE: on-demand).'

Parameters:
  Stage:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - PROD
      - CODE
    Default: CODE
    Description: 'Deployment environment (PROD or CODE)'

Conditions:
  IsProd: !Equals [!Ref Stage, PROD]

Resources:
  SupporterProductTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub 'SupporterProductData-${Stage}'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: supporterId
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: productId
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: supporterId
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: productId
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: !If [IsProd, PROVISIONED, PAY_PER_REQUEST]
      ProvisionedThroughput: !If [IsProd, {ReadCapacityUnits: 20, WriteCapacityUnits: 5}, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      TimeToLiveSpecification:
        Enabled: true
        AttributeName: expiryDate
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Stage
        - Key: Backup
          Value: Enabled
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-Table'

  WriteCapacityScalableTarget:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalableTarget
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      MaxCapacity: 500
      MinCapacity: 5
      ResourceId: !Sub 'table/${SupporterProductTable}'
      ScalableDimension: dynamodb:table:WriteCapacityUnits
      ServiceNamespace: dynamodb

  WriteCapacityScalingPolicy:
    Type: AWS::ApplicationAutoScaling::ScalingPolicy
    Condition: IsProd
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${SupporterProductTable}-WriteCapacityTargetTracking'
      PolicyType: TargetTrackingScaling
      ScalingTargetId: !Ref WriteCapacityScalableTarget
      TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration:
        TargetValue: 70.0
        PredefinedMetricSpecification:
          PredefinedMetricType: DynamoDBWriteCapacityUtilization
        ScaleInCooldown: 60
        ScaleOutCooldown: 60

Outputs:
  TableName:
    Description: 'Name of the DynamoDB table'
    Value: !Ref SupporterProductTable
  TableArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the DynamoDB table'
    Value: !GetAtt SupporterProductTable.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys EC2 IPAM with default private and public scopes for centralized IP address allocation management.'

Parameters:
  IpamName:
    Type: String
    Default: IPAM-Management

Resources:
  IPAM:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAM
    Properties:
      Description: Central IPAM for allocation management
      OperatingRegions:
        - !Ref AWS::Region
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref IpamName
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateScope:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAMScope
    Properties:
      IpamId: !Ref IPAM
      IpamScopeType: private
      IsDefault: true
      Description: Default private scope for RFC1918 allocations
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PublicScope:
    Type: AWS::EC2::IPAMScope
    Properties:
      IpamId: !Ref IPAM
      IpamScopeType: public
      IsDefault: true
      Description: Default public scope for public IP allocations
      Tags:
        - Key: StackName
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  IPAMId:
    Description: IPAM resource ID for cross-stack references
    Value: !Ref IPAM
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAMId'
  IPAMArn:
    Description: IPAM ARN for policy attachments and references
    Value: !GetAtt IPAM.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IPAMArn'
  PrivateScopeId:
    Description: 'Default private scope ID for IPAM pool creation and VPC subnet allocations'
    Value: !Ref PrivateScope
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateScopeId'
  PublicScopeId:
    Description: 'Default public scope ID for public IP pool management'
    Value: !Ref PublicScope
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicScopeId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates three protective IAM managed policies: S3 access for iOS app bucket (ios-apps.sagebridge.org), DynamoDB protection denying deletion/schema changes, and RDS protection denying destructive operations.'

Resources:
  S3AccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Description: 'Grants an iOS application read/write access to the ios-apps.sagebridge.org S3 bucket, including object operations (upload, download, delete) and bucket listing/location permissions.'
      ManagedPolicyName: S3iOSAppAccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
              - s3:GetBucketLocation
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::ios-apps.sagebridge.org/*'

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Description: 'Explicitly denies deletion or schema-modification actions (e.g., DeleteTable, UpdateTable) to prevent accidental data loss in DynamoDB.'
      ManagedPolicyName: DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - dynamodb:DeleteTable
              - dynamodb:UpdateTable
            Resource: '*'

  RDSProtectionPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Description: 'Blocks destructive RDS operations (e.g., DeleteDBInstance, DeleteDBCluster) to safeguard databases and backups.'
      ManagedPolicyName: RDSProtectionPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - rds:DeleteDBInstance
              - rds:DeleteDBCluster
            Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  S3AccessPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 iOS App Access Policy
    Value: !Ref S3AccessPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3AccessPolicyArn'

  DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB Protection Policy
    Value: !Ref DynamoDBProtectionPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBProtectionPolicyArn'

  RDSProtectionPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the RDS Protection Policy
    Value: !Ref RDSProtectionPolicy
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RDSProtectionPolicyArn'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IAM role assumable by Amazon Bedrock service for agent workflows, granting permissions to invoke foundation models and Lambda functions.'

Resources:
  BedrockAgentServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: BedrockAgentServiceRole
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount:
                  Ref: AWS::AccountId
              ArnEquals:
                bedrock:AgentResource: !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockInvokeModelPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - bedrock:InvokeModel
                  - bedrock:InvokeModelWithResponseStream
                Resource: 'arn:aws:bedrock:*::foundation-model/*'
        - PolicyName: LambdaInvokePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:*'

Outputs:
  BedrockAgentServiceRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Bedrock Agent Service Role for use in Bedrock agent creation'
    Value: !GetAtt BedrockAgentServiceRole.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a tag-based AWS Resource Group aggregating resources from EC2, RDS, SageMaker, EBS, and related services for centralized management.'

Metadata:
  Description: 'Resource Group using TAG_FILTERS_1_0 to query tagged resources across multiple AWS services including EC2 instances SSM managed, RDS DB instances/clusters, SageMaker notebook instances, EBS volumes, and EC2 volume attachments.'

Parameters:
  TagKey1:
    Type: String
    Default: Environment
    Description: 'First tag key for filtering (e.g., Environment)'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must consist of alphanumeric characters, hyphen, or underscore.'
  TagValue1:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: Production,Prod
    Description: 'Values for the first tag key (comma-separated)'
  TagKey2:
    Type: String
    Default: Owner
    Description: 'Second tag key for filtering (e.g., Owner)'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+$'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Creates a compliant S3 bucket for ALB access logs with 90-day retention and restricted access,
  including encryption, public access blocks, enforced bucket ownership, and bucket policy
  allowing ELB log delivery.
Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: alb-access-logs-bucket
    Description: >-
      Bucket name prefix. The full name will be BucketName-AWS::AccountId-AWS::Region
      and must be globally unique across all AWS accounts (DNS-compliant: lowercase a-z, 0-9, .).
Resources:
  ALBAccessLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${BucketName}-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ALB-Access-Logs
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: 90DayRetention
            Status: Enabled
            ExpirationInDays: 90
            NoncurrentVersionExpirationInDays: 90
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
  ALBAccessLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowELBLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS:
                - arn:aws:iam::127311923021:root
                - arn:aws:iam::033776779677:root
                - arn:aws:iam::054712060000:root
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub "${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*"
          - Sid: AllowS3ServerLogging
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub "${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*"
          - Sid: RequireEncryptedPutObject
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:PutObject
            Resource: !Sub "${ALBAccessLogsBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'AES256'
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the ALB access logs bucket
    Value: !Ref ALBAccessLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the ALB access logs bucket
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.Arn
  BucketDomainName:
    Description: >-
      Regional domain name of the ALB access logs bucket for ALB logging configuration reference
    Value: !GetAtt ALBAccessLogsBucket.RegionalDomainName

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure and cost-optimized S3 bucket for storing CloudWatch export data with configurable versioning and automated lifecycle management.

Parameters:
  BucketNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: cw-exports
    Description: Suffix for the unique bucket name
  EnableVersioning:
    Type: String
    Default: "true"
    AllowedValues:
      - "true"
      - "false"
    Description: Enable bucket versioning
  TransitionToIA:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: Days after which to transition to STANDARD_IA
  TransitionToGlacier:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    Description: Days after which to transition to GLACIER_IR
  ExpireAfter:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365
    Description: Days after which to expire noncurrent versions
  LoggingBucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: Name of an existing S3 bucket to send server access logs (optional)

Conditions:
  EnableVersioningCondition: !Equals [!Ref EnableVersioning, "true"]

Resources:
  CWExportBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${BucketNameSuffix}-${AWS::StackName}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !If [EnableVersioningCondition, Enabled, Suspended]
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: CloudWatchExportLifecycle
            Status: Enabled
            AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload:
              DaysAfterInitiation: 7
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: !Ref ExpireAfter
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToIA
                StorageClass: STANDARD_IA
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacier
                StorageClass: GLACIER_IR
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CloudWatchExports
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  CWExportBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref CWExportBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: EnforceTransportSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${CWExportBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${CWExportBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              BoolIfExists:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: EnforceSSE
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${CWExportBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              StringNotEquals:
                's3:x-amz-server-side-encryption': 'AES256'
          - Sid: AllowS3LogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logging.s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${CWExportBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${CWExportBucket}/*'
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchLogsExport
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:GetBucketAcl
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${CWExportBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${CWExportBucket}/cw-exports/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch export S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref CWExportBucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketName'
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the CloudWatch export S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt CWExportBucket.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketArn'
  BucketDomainName:
    Description: Regional domain name of the CloudWatch export S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt CWExportBucket.DomainName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BucketDomainName'
deploy_logs: None

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys GuardDuty detector for EC2 security monitoring with malware protection and findings export.

Parameters:
  S3BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'guardduty-findings-bucket'
    Description: |
      Name of the existing customer-managed S3 bucket for exporting GuardDuty findings related to EC2 threats.
      Recommended naming convention: GuardDutyFindings-{AWS::AccountId}-{AWS::Region} (e.g., GuardDutyFindings-123456789012-us-east-1)
      Ensure the bucket:
      - Uses server-side encryption (SSE-KMS or SSE-S3)
      - Has a bucket policy denying non-encrypted PUT operations
      - Has Block Public Access enabled at bucket and account level
      - Has a bucket policy allowing GuardDuty service (guardduty.amazonaws.com) to perform s3:PutObject, s3:GetBucketAcl, etc.
      Replace default with your existing bucket name following recommended convention.

Resources:
  GuardDutyDetector:
    Type: AWS::GuardDuty::Detector
    Properties:
      Enable: true
      DataSources:
        MalwareProtection:
          ScanEc2InstanceWithFindings:
            EbsVolumes: true
        S3Logs:
          Enable: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: GuardDutyDetector
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2MaliciousActivityMonitoring

  GuardDutyPublishingDestination:
    Type: AWS::GuardDuty::PublishingDestination
    Properties:
      DetectorId: !Ref GuardDutyDetector
      DestinationType: S3
      DestinationProperties:
        DestinationArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${S3BucketName}'

Outputs:
  DetectorId:
    Description: ID of the GuardDuty detector
    Value: !Ref GuardDutyDetector

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >-
  Provisions a publicly accessible S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts and static assets,
  with server-side encryption using a customer-managed KMS key with automatic rotation,
  granular key policy, and key alias.
Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'lambda-artifacts-demo'
    Description: 'Base name for the bucket (e.g., lambda-artifacts-stack). Bucket name will be BucketName-Region and must be globally unique.'
  ServiceRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Default: 'arn:aws:iam::111111111111:role/DummyLambdaServiceRole'
    Description: 'ARN of the existing IAM service role that will use the KMS key for encryption/decryption.'
  KeyAliasName:
    Type: String
    Default: alias/lambda-artifacts-key
    Description: 'Name of the KMS key alias.'
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: Production
    Description: 'Environment for tagging.'
Resources:
  KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for encrypting Lambda artifacts S3 bucket
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowRootAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: kms:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowServiceRoleUse
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Ref ServiceRoleArn
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
              - kms:CreateGrant
              - kms:RetireGrant
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowS3ServiceSSE
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'kms:ViaService': !Sub 's3.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'
              ArnEquals:
                'kms:EncryptionContext:aws:s3:arn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${BucketName}-${AWS::Region}/*'
          - Sid: DenySensitiveWithoutMFA
            Effect: Deny
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - kms:ScheduleKeyDeletion
              - kms:CancelKeyDeletion
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': false
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: LambdaArtifacts
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
  KeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Ref KeyAliasName
      TargetKeyId: !Ref KMSKey
  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketName}-${AWS::Region}'
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref KMSKey
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: LambdaArtifacts
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment
Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: 'Name of the S3 bucket for Lambda artifacts and static assets.'
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket.'
    Value: !GetAtt Bucket.Arn
  KMSKeyArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the customer-managed KMS key.'
    Value: !Ref KMSKey
  KMSKeyAliasArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the KMS key alias for simplified referencing.'
    Value: !Ref KeyAlias
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-4c3e721c' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-4c3e721c: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'KMSKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'KMSKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'Bucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'Bucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'KeyAlias: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'KeyAlias: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-4c3e721c: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'IAM role for AWS Service Catalog to enable secure provisioning and management of S3 and Lambda resources.'

Parameters:
  RoleNameSuffix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9-]*$'
    Description: 'Optional suffix for the role name.'

Resources:
  ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub 'ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole-${RoleNameSuffix}'
      Path: '/'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: servicecatalog.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonS3FullAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AWSLambdaExecute
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: ServiceCatalogProvisioning
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  ServiceCatalogOperationsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: ServiceCatalogOperationsPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - servicecatalog:ProvisionProduct
              - servicecatalog:UpdateProvisionedProduct
              - servicecatalog:TerminateProvisionedProduct
              - servicecatalog:DescribeProvisionedProduct
              - servicecatalog:CreateProvisioningArtifact
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:RequestedRegion: !Sub '${AWS::Region}'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:PassRole
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/ServiceCatalog*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:RequestedRegion: !Sub '${AWS::Region}'

  IAMManagementPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: IAMManagementPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:CreateRole
              - iam:DeleteRole
              - iam:AttachRolePolicy
              - iam:DetachRolePolicy
              - iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy
              - iam:PutRolePolicy
              - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/ServiceCatalog*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/Provisioning*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/ServiceCatalog*'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/Provisioning*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:RequestedRegion: !Sub '${AWS::Region}'

  LambdaLifecyclePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: LambdaLifecyclePolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - lambda:CreateFunction
              - lambda:DeleteFunction
              - lambda:UpdateFunctionCode
              - lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration
              - lambda:InvokeFunction
              - lambda:ListFunctions
              - lambda:GetFunction
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:RequestedRegion: !Sub '${AWS::Region}'

  CloudFormationOperationsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: CloudFormationOperationsPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - cloudformation:CreateStack
              - cloudformation:UpdateStack
              - cloudformation:DeleteStack
              - cloudformation:DescribeStacks
              - cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents
              - cloudformation:CreateChangeSet
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/*ServiceCatalog*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:RequestedRegion: !Sub '${AWS::Region}'

  SNSIntegrationPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: SNSIntegrationPolicy
      Roles:
        - !Ref ServiceCatalogProvisioningRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sns:CreateTopic
              - sns:DeleteTopic
              - sns:Publish
              - sns:Subscribe
              - sns:Unsubscribe
              - sns:GetTopicAttributes
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:sns:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:ServiceCatalogNotification*'
            Condition:

Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning infrastructure for EC2 Image Builder, including a secure S3 bucket for logs and IAM role/instance profile with SSM and Image Builder permissions.'

Resources:

      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow S3 Service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

  ImageBuilderLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub 'imagebuilder-logs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::StackName}'
      OwnershipControls:
        Rules:
          - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref ImageBuilderLogsKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: u12345678@anu.edu.au

  ImageBuilderLogsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ImageBuilderLogsPolicy'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:GetObject*
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}/*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${ImageBuilderLogsBucket}'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:DescribeKey

  ImageBuilderInstanceRole:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'S3 bucket for storing VPC flow logs with automated lifecycle management and strict access controls.'

Parameters:
  BucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^$|^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]{1,61}[a-z0-9])?$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Bucket name must comply with S3 naming rules if provided.'
  VersioningConfig:
    Type: String
    Default: Enabled
    AllowedValues:
      - Enabled
      - Suspended
  TransitionToGlacierDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 0
  ExpirationDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 365000
    MinValue: 1

Conditions:
  BucketNameProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref BucketName, '']]

Resources:
  VPCFlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !If
        - BucketNameProvided
        - !Ref BucketName
        - !Sub '${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-vpc-flow-logs-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: !Ref VersioningConfig
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - Id: FlowLogsLifecycleRule
            Status: Enabled
            Prefix: AWSLogs/
            NoncurrentVersionExpiration:
              NoncurrentDays: !Ref ExpirationDays
            ExpirationInDays: !Ref ExpirationDays
            Transitions:
              - TransitionInDays: !Ref TransitionToGlacierDays
                StorageClass: GLACIER
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: VPCFlowLogsBucket
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: VPC Flow Logs Storage

  VPCFlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${VPCFlowLogsBucket}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*/*/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                's3:x-amz-acl': bucket-owner-full-control
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
          - Sid: EnforceHTTPS
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${VPCFlowLogsBucket}'
              - !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${VPCFlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref VPCFlowLogsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: ARN of the S3 bucket
    Value: !GetAtt VPCFlowLogsBucket.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for EC2 with Nginx setup via SSM Automation triggered by tag.

Parameters:
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair for SSH access (leave empty to disable)
  SSHInboundCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block from which to allow inbound SSH (port 22) traffic

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Nginx EC2 instance allowing HTTP, SSH inbound and all outbound
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHInboundCIDR
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxSG'

  SSMEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: SSMEC2Role
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SSMExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:SendCommand
                  - ssm:CancelCommand
                  - ssm:GetCommandInvocation
                  - ssm:ListCommandInvocations
                  - ssm:GetDocument
                  - ssm:ListDocuments
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMEC2Role'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMEC2Role

  NginxNetworkInterface:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkInterface
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      GroupSet:
        - !Ref SecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-NginxNI'

  NginxEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.micro
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      KeyName: !If
        - UseKeyPair
        - !Ref KeyName
        - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          NetworkInterfaceId: !Ref NginxNetworkInterface
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
          Ebs:
            VolumeType: gp3
            VolumeSize: 8
            Encrypted: true
            DeleteOnTermination: true
      MetadataOptions:
        HttpEndpoint: "disabled"
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NginxEC2Instance
        - Key: nginx
          Value: Yes

  NginxSetupAutomation:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Document
    Properties:
      Name: NginxSetupAutomation
      DocumentType: Automation
      DocumentFormat: "JSON"
      Content:
        Fn::Sub:
          - |
            {
              "schemaVersion": "0.3",
              "description": "${description}",
              "assumeRole": "${roleArn}",
              "parameters": {
                "InstanceId": {
                  "type": "String",
                  "description": "The ID of the EC2 instance to configure (use tag:nginx=Yes for targeting)"
                },
                "RebootTimeout": {
                  "type": "Number",
                  "default": 600,
                  "description": "Timeout in seconds for reboot step"
                },
                "ValidationEndpoint": {
                  "type": "String",
                  "default": "http://localhost",
                  "description": "Endpoint for Nginx validation"
                }
              },
              "mainSteps": [
                {
                  "name": "UpdateOS",
                  "action": "aws:runShellScript",
                  "description": "Update and clean OS packages",
                  "inputs": {
                    "InstanceIds": ["{{ InstanceId }}"],
                    "commands": ["yum install -y yum-utils", "yum update -y", "yum autoremove -y"],
                    "TimeoutSeconds": 300
                  }
                },
                {
                  "name": "CheckAndReboot",
                  "action": "aws:runShellScript",
                  "description": "Check for reboot need and reboot if required",
                  "inputs": {
                    "InstanceIds": ["{{ InstanceId }}"],
                    "commands": ["needs-restarting -r && reboot"],
                    "TimeoutSeconds": "{{ RebootTimeout }}"
                  }
                },
                {
                  "name": "InstallNginx",
                  "action": "aws:runShellScript",
                  "description": "Install and start Nginx",
                  "inputs": {
                    "InstanceIds": ["{{ InstanceId }}"],
                    "commands": ["yum install -y nginx", "systemctl enable nginx", "systemctl start nginx"],
                    "TimeoutSeconds": 300
                  }
                },
                {
                  "name": "ValidateNginx",
                  "action": "aws:runShellScript",
                  "description": "Validate Nginx is responding",
                  "inputs": {
                    "InstanceIds": ["{{ InstanceId }}"],
                    "commands": ["curl -f '{{ ValidationEndpoint }}' || exit 1"],
                    "TimeoutSeconds": 60
                  }
                }
              ]
            }
          - description: |
              Multi-step process for OS updates with reboot checks, Nginx installation, and curl-based validation 
              of the web server using tag-driven SSM Automation (target instances with tag nginx:Yes).
            roleArn: !GetAtt SSMEC2Role.Arn

Conditions:
  UseKeyPair: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KeyName, '']]

Outputs:
  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: The ID of the Nginx EC2 instance (use with SSM Automation or tag:nginx=Yes)
    Value: !Ref NginxEC2Instance
  SSMDocumentName:
    Description: Name of the SSM Automation document for Nginx setup
    Value: !Ref NginxSetupAutomation
  PublicDnsName:
    Description: Public DNS name of the EC2 instance for Nginx access
    Value: !GetAtt NginxEC2Instance.PublicDnsName

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB

  NATGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nat-eip'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NATGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-nat'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  PrivateNatRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  ALBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for internal Application Load Balancer allowing HTTP/HTTPS from VPC
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 0
          ToPort: 65535
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb-sg'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  AppSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application allowing traffic from ALB, SSH/PostgreSQL/internal VPC/self
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 0
          ToPort: 65535
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 0
          ToPort: 65535
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-sg'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DBSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for database allowing PostgreSQL from app SG
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 5432
          ToPort: 5432
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 0
          ToPort: 65535
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: icmp
          FromPort: -1
          ToPort: -1
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-db-sg'
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-alb'
      Type: application
      Scheme: internal
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetA
        - !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      LoadBalancerAttributes:
        - Key: routing.http.drop_invalid_header_fields.enabled
          Value: 'true'
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
    DependsOn:
      - PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation
      - PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation

  PlaceholderCert:
    Type: AWS::CertificateManager::Certificate
    Properties:
      DomainName: '*'

  ALBListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: redirect
          RedirectConfig:
            Protocol: 'HTTPS'
            Port: '443'
            StatusCode: 'HTTP_301'

  HTTPSListener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref ALB
      Port: 443
      Protocol: HTTPS
      Certificates:
        - CertificateArn: !Ref PlaceholderCert
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: fixed-response
          FixedResponseConfig:
            StatusCode: '503'
            ContentType: 'text/plain'
            MessageBody: 'Service Temporarily Unavailable'

  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-app-repo'
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      ImageTagMutability: IMMUTABLE
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  SSMVPCId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/infra/${AWS::StackName}/vpc-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Environment: Production

  SSMPublicSubnetId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/infra/${AWS::StackName}/public-subnet-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Environment: Production

  SSMPrivateSubnetAId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/infra/${AWS::StackName}/private-subnet-a-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Environment: Production

  SSMPrivateSubnetBId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/infra/${AWS::StackName}/private-subnet-b-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Environment: Production

  SSMALBSgId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/infra/${AWS::StackName}/alb-security-group-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Environment: Production

  SSMAppSgId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/infra/${AWS::StackName}/app-security-group-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref AppSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Environment: Production

  SSMDBSgId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/infra/${AWS::StackName}/db-security-group-id'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref DBSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Environment: Production

  SSMAlbArn:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/infra/${AWS::StackName}/alb-arn'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALB
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Environment: Production

  SSMAlbListenerArn:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '/infra/${AWS::StackName}/alb-http-listener-arn'
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref ALBListener
      Tags:
        Stack: !Ref AWS::StackName
        Environment: Production

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template to deploy AWS Amplify TodoApp with production branch hosting'

Parameters:
  AppName:
    Type: String
    Default: TodoApp
    Description: 'Name of the Amplify App'
  Platform:
    Type: String
    Default: WEB
    AllowedValues:
      - WEB
      - WEB_DYNAMIC
      - WEB_COMPUTE
    Description: Frontend platform for TodoApp (WEB for React-based web apps)
  BranchName:
    Type: String
    Default: production
  EnableAutoBuild:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'

Conditions:
  AutoBuildEnabled: !Not [!Equals [!Ref EnableAutoBuild, 'false']]

Resources:
  TodoApp:
    Type: 'AWS::Amplify::App'
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref AppName
      Platform: !Ref Platform
      Description: 'Amplify app for hosting and deploying TodoApp web application'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AppName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: 'Production'

  ProductionBranch:
    Type: 'AWS::Amplify::Branch'
    Properties:
      AppId: !GetAtt TodoApp.AppId
      BranchName: !Ref BranchName
      EnableAutoBuild: !If [AutoBuildEnabled, true, false]
      Tags:
        - Key: Framework
          Value: React
        - Key: Stage
          Value: PRODUCTION

Outputs:
  AmplifyAppId:
    Description: 'ID of the Amplify App'
    Value: !Ref TodoApp
  DefaultDomainUrl:
    Description: 'Default domain URL of the Amplify App'
    Value: !GetAtt TodoApp.DefaultDomain
  BranchArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Amplify Branch'
    Value: !GetAtt ProductionBranch.Arn
  BranchName:
    Description: 'Name of the production branch'
    Value: !Ref BranchName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Deploys a secure, multi-AZ VPC architecture with public/private subnets and high availability NAT Gateways following AWS Well-Architected security best practices.

Parameters:
  AvailabilityZones:
    Type: String
    Default: us-east-1a,us-east-1b

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SecureMultiAZVPC
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecureVPCInfrastructure

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SecureMultiAZIGW
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PublicInternetAccess

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  EIPA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NATGatewayEIPA
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: NATGatewayHA

  EIPB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NATGatewayEIPB
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: NATGatewayHA

  PublicSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select ["0", !Split [",", !Ref AvailabilityZones]]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnetA-us-east-1a
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PublicLoadBalancerTier

  PublicSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select ["1", !Split [",", !Ref AvailabilityZones]]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnetB-us-east-1b
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PublicLoadBalancerTier

  PrivateSubnetA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select ["0", !Split [",", !Ref AvailabilityZones]]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.101.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnetA-us-east-1a
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PrivateAppTier

  PrivateSubnetB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select ["1", !Split [",", !Ref AvailabilityZones]]
      CidrBlock: 10.0.102.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnetB-us-east-1b
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PrivateAppTier

  NATGatewayA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPA.AllocationId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NATGatewayA-us-east-1a
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PrivateSubnetOutbound

  NATGatewayB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPB.AllocationId
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: NATGatewayB-us-east-1b
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PrivateSubnetOutbound

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PublicIGWRouting

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateRouteTableA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTableA-us-east-1a
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PrivateNATRouting

  PrivateRouteA:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableA
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGatewayA

  PrivateSubnetARouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetA
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableA

  PrivateRouteTableB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTableB-us-east-1b
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: PrivateNATRouting

  PrivateRouteB:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableB
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGatewayB

  PrivateSubnetBRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnetB
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTableB

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPCId"

  PublicSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of Public Subnet IDs across AZs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicSubnetA, !Ref PublicSubnetB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetIds"

  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of Private Subnet IDs across AZs
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PrivateSubnetA, !Ref PrivateSubnetB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnetIds"

  NatGatewayIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of NAT Gateway IDs for high availability
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref NATGatewayA, !Ref NATGatewayB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-NatGatewayIds"

  RouteTableIds:
    Description: Comma-separated list of Route Table IDs (Public, PrivateA, PrivateB)
    Value: !Join [",", [!Ref PublicRouteTable, !Ref PrivateRouteTableA, !Ref PrivateRouteTableB]]
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-RouteTableIds"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Creates a VPC with flow logging configured to monitor network traffic patterns, delivering logs to a secure S3 bucket with public access blocked, SSL enforced, and minimal permissions.'

Parameters:
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
  BucketNamePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    AllowedPattern: '^(?:[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Optional: lowercase alphanumeric/hyphens (0 or 3+ chars), start/end alnum if non-empty, for S3 bucket compliance.'
  LogPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: AWSLogs/
  TrafficType:
    Type: String
    Default: ALL
  MaxAggregationInterval:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  FlowLogsKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub 'KMS key for VPC flow logs in ${AWS::StackName}'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:vpcflowlog/*'

  FlowLogsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${BucketNamePrefix}${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}-vpc-flowlogs-${AWS::StackName}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref FlowLogsKMSKey

  FlowLogsBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource: !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowFlowLogDelivery
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: delivery.logs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:PutObjectAcl'
              - 's3:GetBucketAcl'
            Resource: !Sub '${FlowLogsBucket}/${LogPrefix}${AWS::AccountId}/*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:ec2:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:vpcflowlog/*'

  VPCFlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    DependsOn: FlowLogsBucketPolicy
    Properties:
      ResourceId: !Ref MyVPC
      ResourceType: VPC
      TrafficType: !Ref TrafficType
      LogDestination: !Ref FlowLogsBucket
      LogFormat: 'version account-id interface-id srcaddr dstaddr srcport dstport protocol packets bytes start end action log-status vpc-id subnet-id instance-id traffic-type pkt-src-aws-service pkt-dst-aws-service flow-direction traffic-path'
      MaxAggregationInterval: !Ref MaxAggregationInterval

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref MyVPC
  BucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket name for VPC flow logs, for downstream integration
    Value: !Ref FlowLogsBucket

Description: Lab environment for testing EC2 instance scheduling automation

Parameters:
  KeyName:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: Name of an existing EC2 KeyPair to SSH into the instances (optional, leave empty for SSM only)

Mappings:
  AmiMap:
    us-east-1:
      Latest: ami-0c02fb55956c7d316
    us-east-2:
      Latest: ami-0d9585d0dee276d80
    us-west-2:
      Latest: ami-0d1cd67c26f5fca19
    eu-west-1:
      Latest: ami-0fe268f7247c0c5d5

Resources:
  LabVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LabVPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: lab
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-scheduling-lab

  LabIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LabIGW"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: lab
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-scheduling-lab

  LabIGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref LabIGW

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      AvailabilityZone:
        Fn::Select:
          - '0'
          - !GetAZs
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: lab
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-scheduling-lab

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: lab
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-scheduling-lab

  PublicSubnetDefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref LabIGW

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  LabSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for lab instances allowing HTTPS inbound and default outbound
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LabSG"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: lab
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-scheduling-lab

    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ManagedInstanceRole"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: lab
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: EC2-scheduling-lab

    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning a REST API Gateway integrated with an SQS queue for HTTP-based message retrieval via GET /messages, simplifying polling over web endpoint.'

Resources:
  SQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SQSQueue'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Sub 'arn:aws:kms:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alias/aws/sqs'

  SQSQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAPIGatewayReceiveMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${ApiGateway}/*/*/*'

  ApiGatewaySQSExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SQSReceiveMessagePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn

  ApiGateway:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: SQSMessageRetrievalApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  MessagesResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGateway
      ParentId: !GetAtt ApiGateway.RootResourceId
      PathPart: messages

  GetMessagesMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGateway
      ResourceId: !Ref MessagesResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:action/ReceiveMessage'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySQSExecutionRole.Arn
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestParameters:
          'method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages': 'integration.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages'
          'method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds': 'integration.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds'
          'method.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout': 'integration.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout'

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGateway
      Description: Initial deployment
    DependsOn: GetMessagesMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref ApiGateway
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: prod

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: Full API Gateway endpoint URL for retrieving SQS messages
    Value: !Sub 'https://${ApiGateway}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/messages'
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !Ref SQSQueue
  SQSQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure Cognito user management system with admin-only provisioning.'

Parameters:
  UserPoolName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'UserPool'
    Description: Name for the Cognito User Pool
  DomainPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: 'myapp-localhost'
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 63
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9\-]*[a-z0-9])?$'
    Description: Unique domain prefix for the Cognito hosted UI domain (must be globally unique)
  ClientName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'Client'
    Description: Name for the User Pool Client
  CallbackUrls:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'http://localhost:3000/'
    Description: List of allowed callback URLs for the User Pool Client
  LogoutUrls:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'http://localhost:3000/'
    Description: List of allowed logout URLs for the User Pool Client
  AllowedOAuthScopes:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'openid,email,phone,profile'
    Description: Allowed OAuth scopes

Resources:
  UserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    Properties:
      UserPoolName: !Ref UserPoolName
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
      UsernameConfiguration:
        CaseSensitive: false
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
        UnusedAccountValidityDays: 7
        InviteMessageTemplate:
          EmailSubject: !Sub 'Welcome to ${AWS::StackName} - Your temporary password'
          EmailMessage: !Sub 'Thank you for joining ${AWS::StackName}.\n\nYour username is {username}\nYour temporary password is {####}\n\nPlease use these credentials to sign in and complete your account setup.'
          SMSMessage: !Sub 'Your ${AWS::StackName} username is {username} and temporary password is {####}'
      AccountRecoverySetting:
        RecoveryMechanisms:
          - Name: verified_email
            Priority: 1
      MfaConfiguration: "OFF"

  UserPoolDomain:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolDomain
    Properties:
      Domain: !Sub '${DomainPrefix}.${AWS::Region}.amazoncognito.com'
      UserPoolId: !Ref UserPool

  UserPoolClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      UserPoolId: !Ref UserPool
      ClientName: !Ref ClientName
      GenerateSecret: false
      AllowedOAuthFlows:
        - code
        - implicit
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      AllowedOAuthScopes: !Ref AllowedOAuthScopes
      CallbackURLs: !Ref CallbackUrls
      LogoutURLs: !Ref LogoutUrls
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
        - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
        - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
      AccessTokenValidity: 24
      IdTokenValidity: 24
      RefreshTokenValidity: 30
      PreventUserExistenceErrors: ENABLED
      EnableTokenRevocation: true

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool ID
    Value: !Ref UserPool
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolId'
  UserPoolClientId:
    Description: Cognito User Pool Client ID
    Value: !Ref UserPoolClient
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolClientId'
  UserPoolDomainName:
    Description: Cognito User Pool Domain Name
    Value: !Ref UserPoolDomain
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-UserPoolDomainName'
  HostedUIRedirectURI:
    Description: Hosted UI redirect URI endpoint
    Value: !Sub 'https://${DomainPrefix}.auth.${AWS::Region}.amazoncognito.com/oauth2/idpresponse'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-HostedUIRedirectURI'
  LoginEndpoint:
    Description: Base Login Endpoint for Hosted UI
    Value: !Sub 'https://${DomainPrefix}.auth.${AWS::Region}.amazoncognito.com/login'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LoginEndpoint'
