final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Event-driven integration between AWS EventBridge and MongoDB API endpoint with fault-tolerant dead-letter SQS queue for redundancy and logging."

Resources:
  MongoDBIntegrationEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBIntegrationEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration

  MongoDBConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: test_name
          ApiKeyValue: "test_value"

  MongoDBDLQKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "CMK for MongoDB DLQ encryption"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action: kms:GenerateDataKey
            Resource: "*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                kms:ViaService: !Sub "sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration

  MongoDBDeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MongoDBDeadLetterQueue
      VisibilityTimeout: 300
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MongoDBDLQKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration

  EventBridgeApiDestinationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
              - sts:TagSession
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Sub "${AWS::AccountId}"
              StringLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:rule/*"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: EventBridgeApiDestinationPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:SendMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt MongoDBDeadLetterQueue.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:InvokeApiDestination
                Resource: "*"
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: kms:GenerateDataKey
                Resource: !GetAtt MongoDBDLQKey.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration

  MongoDBApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBApiDestination
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt MongoDBConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: https://www.testanu.com
      HttpMethod: POST

  MongoDBIntegrationRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref MongoDBIntegrationEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - custom.mongodb.app
      Targets:
        - Id: MongoDBTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputTemplate: '<aws.events.event>'
          RetryPolicy:
            MaximumRetryAttempts: 3
            MaximumEventAgeInSeconds: 3600
        - Id: DLQTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt MongoDBDeadLetterQueue.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeApiDestinationRole.Arn
          InputTransformer:
            InputTemplate: '<aws.events.event>'
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeMongoDBIntegration

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBIntegrationEventBus.Arn
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBridge EventBus
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge API Destination
  ApiDestinationName:
    Value: !Ref MongoDBApiDestination
    Description: Name of the EventBridge API Destination
  ConnectionArn:
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBConnection.Arn
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Connection
  DeadLetterQueueUrl:
    Value: !Ref MongoDBDeadLetterQueue
    Description: URL of the Dead Letter SQS Queue
  DeadLetterQueueArn:
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBDeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Description: ARN of the Dead Letter SQS Queue
  RuleArn:
    Value: !GetAtt MongoDBIntegrationRule.Arn
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge Rule

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for cross-account private API Gateway integrated with Lambda backend, secured via VPC endpoint and custom domain.'

Parameters:
  VpcEndpointId:
    Type: String
    Default: 'vpce-0123456789abcdef0'
    Description: 'Cross-account VPC Endpoint ID for private access'
  ApiStageName:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: 'API stage name'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CrossAccountPrivateApi

  PrivateApiLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: PrivateApiLambda
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Timeout: 30
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          def handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'headers': {
                      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                  },
                  'body': 'Hello from private Lambda!'
              }
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CrossAccountPrivateApi

  PrivateApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: CrossAccountPrivateApi
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - PRIVATE
      Policy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": "*",
              "Action": "execute-api:Invoke",
              "Resource": "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/*/*/*",
              "Condition": {
                "StringEquals": {
                  "aws:SourceVpce": "${VpcEndpointId}"
                }
              }
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: CrossAccountPrivateApi

  GetMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApi
      ResourceId: !GetAtt PrivateApi.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: AWS_PROXY
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${PrivateApiLambda.Arn}/invocations'

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApi
    DependsOn: GetMethod

  ApiStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref PrivateApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: !Ref ApiStageName

  ApiGatewayInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref PrivateApiLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: apigateway.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/*/*/*'

Outputs:
  RestApiId:
    Description: 'REST API ID'
    Value: !Ref PrivateApi
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'Lambda Function ARN'
    Value: !GetAtt PrivateApiLambda.Arn
  InvokeUrl:
    Description: 'Private API Invoke URL'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${PrivateApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${ApiStageName}/'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge integration with DataDog for centralized log forwarding, automating delivery of application logs from MyDataDogApp source to DataDog API.'

Parameters:
  DataDogApiKey:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Default: testanu
    Description: 'DataDog API key for authenticating log ingestion requests.'

Resources:
  DataDogEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: DataDogEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: DataDogEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  DataDogConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: DataDogConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: DD-API-KEY
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref DataDogApiKey

  DataDogApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !Ref DataDogConnection
      InvocationEndpoint: https://http-intake.logs.datadoghq.com
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 1000

  DataDogSQSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Enabled: true
      Description: CMK for DataDog DLQ encryption
      KeyPolicy:

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning an S3 bucket with SQS queue for event-driven object upload notifications (s3:ObjectCreated:*)'

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: alias/aws/s3
      NotificationConfiguration:
        QueueConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Queue: !GetAtt ObjectUploadQueue.Arn

  SqsEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for SQS encryption'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sqs.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
            Resource: '*'

  ObjectUploadQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ObjectUploadQueue-${AWS::Region}'
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsEncryptionKey

  ObjectUploadQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref ObjectUploadQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt ObjectUploadQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn

Outputs:
  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  SQSQueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS queue
    Value: !Ref ObjectUploadQueue
  SQSQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS queue
    Value: !GetAtt ObjectUploadQueue.Arn
deploy_logs: ["Creating stack 'iac-god-eval-7ef5ba45' on localstack", 'iac-god-eval-7ef5ba45: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SqsEncryptionKey: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'SqsEncryptionKey: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ObjectUploadQueue: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ObjectUploadQueue: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'S3Bucket: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'S3Bucket: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'ObjectUploadQueuePolicy: CREATE_IN_PROGRESS - N/A', 'ObjectUploadQueuePolicy: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A', 'iac-god-eval-7ef5ba45: CREATE_COMPLETE - N/A']

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Automated monitoring for AWS Secrets Manager lifecycle events with email alerts"

Parameters:
  EmailAddress:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Email address for Secrets Manager alerts"
  StackPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: "SecretsManagerAlerts"
    Description: "Prefix for resource names"
  KmsKeyId:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "ARN or alias of customer-managed KMS key for SNS encryption; leave blank to use template-created CMK"

Conditions:
  UseProvidedKmsKey: !Not [!Equals [!Ref KmsKeyId, ""]]
  UseEmailSubscription: !Not [!Equals [!Ref EmailAddress, ""]]

Resources:
  SNSCmkKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: "CMK for Secrets Manager Alerts SNS encryption"
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "EnableRootAccess"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
            Action: "kms:*"
            Resource: "*"
          - Sid: "AllowSNSPublish"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "sns.amazonaws.com"
            Action:
              - "kms:GenerateDataKey"
            Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerAlerts

  SNSCmkAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub "alias/${StackPrefix}SnsKey"
      TargetKeyId: !Ref SNSCmkKey

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: "Secrets Manager Critical Events"
      KmsMasterKeyId: !If [UseProvidedKmsKey, !Ref KmsKeyId, !Ref SNSCmkAlias]
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackPrefix}Topic-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerAlerts

  EventBridgeRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Description: "Detects critical Secrets Manager API calls for lifecycle events"
      State: ENABLED
      Name: !Sub "${StackPrefix}Rule-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}"
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - aws.secretsmanager
        "detail-type":
          - AWS API Call via CloudTrail
        detail:
          eventSource:
            - secretsmanager.amazonaws.com
          eventName:
            - CreateSecret
            - DeleteSecret
            - UpdateSecret
            - RotateSecret
      Targets:
        - Id: SNSTarget
          Arn: !Ref SNSTopic
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap:
              "eventName": "$.detail.eventName"
              "accountId": "$.account"
              "region": "$.region"
              "secretArn": "$.resources[0].ARN"
              "fullEvent": "$"
            InputTemplate: |
              "Subject: AWS Secrets Manager ALERT - <eventName> on <secretArn>

              Account ID: <accountId>
              Region: <region>

              Full Event Details:
              <fullEvent>"
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: SecretsManagerAlerts

  SNSTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref SNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeRule.Arn

  SNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Condition: UseEmailSubscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic
      Endpoint: !Ref EmailAddress

Outputs:
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: "SNS Topic ARN"
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic
  EventBridgeRuleArn:
    Description: "EventBridge Rule ARN"
    Value: !Ref EventBridgeRule
  SubscriptionArn:
    Description: "Subscription ARN (check email to confirm subscription)"
    Value: !If [UseEmailSubscription, !Ref SNSSubscription, "No subscription created (empty EmailAddress)"]

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SNS-to-SQS fanout system with filtered message routing, which enables scalable and selective message processing for different metric types (e.g., temperature, humidity). The template provisions a central SNS topic, three SQS queues (all metrics and filtered temperature/humidity), corresponding DLQs, subscriptions with filtering, and necessary queue policies.'

Resources:
  MetricsSNSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for encrypting the Metrics Fanout SNS Topic'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SNS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sns.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MetricsSQSEncryptionKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'CMK for encrypting Metrics SQS Queues and DLQs'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: 'Allow root access'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: 'Allow SQS service'
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 'sqs.amazonaws.com'
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  MetricsFanoutTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      DisplayName: Metrics Fanout Topic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsSNSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AllMetricsDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-AllMetricsDLQ'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsSQSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  TemperatureDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-TemperatureDLQ'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsSQSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  HumidityDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-HumidityDLQ'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsSQSEncryptionKey
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AllMetricsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-AllMetricsQueue'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsSQSEncryptionKey
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt AllMetricsDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 4
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  TemperatureSqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-TemperatureSqsQueue'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsSQSEncryptionKey
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt TemperatureDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 4
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  HumiditySqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${AWS::Region}-HumiditySqsQueue'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref MetricsSQSEncryptionKey
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt HumidityDLQ.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 4
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  AllMetricsQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref AllMetricsQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt AllMetricsQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                aws:SourceArn: !Ref MetricsFanoutTopic

  TemperatureQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref TemperatureSqsQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow

  HumidityQueuePolicy:

        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:

    Properties:

  TemperatureSqsQueueArn:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for event-driven integration between DynamoDB Streams and EventBridge Pipes, routing INSERT and MODIFY events from an Orders table to a central EventBridge bus.

Resources:
  OrdersTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-OrdersTable"
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: orderId
          KeyType: HASH
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: orderId
          AttributeType: S
      StreamSpecification:
        StreamViewType: NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      PointInTimeRecoverySpecification:
        PointInTimeRecoveryEnabled: true

  CentralEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-CentralEventBus"

  PipesExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-PipesExecutionRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: pipes.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount': !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
              ArnLike:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:events:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:pipe/${AWS::StackName}-*'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBStreamPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:DescribeStream
                  - dynamodb:GetRecords
                  - dynamodb:GetShardIterator
                Resource: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventBridgePolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:PutEvents
                Resource: !GetAtt CentralEventBus.Arn

  InsertPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InsertPipe"
      Source: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
      Target: !GetAtt CentralEventBus.Arn
      RoleArn: !GetAtt PipesExecutionRole.Arn

  ModifyPipe:
    Type: AWS::Pipes::Pipe
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ModifyPipe"
      Source: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
      Target: !GetAtt CentralEventBus.Arn
      RoleArn: !GetAtt PipesExecutionRole.Arn

Outputs:
  OrdersTableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB Orders table
    Value: !Ref OrdersTable
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-OrdersTableName"
  OrdersTableArn:
    Description: ARN of the DynamoDB Orders table
    Value: !GetAtt OrdersTable.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-OrdersTableArn"
  OrdersTableStreamArn:
    Description: Stream ARN of the DynamoDB Orders table
    Value: !GetAtt OrdersTable.StreamArn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-OrdersTableStreamArn"
  CentralEventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the central EventBridge event bus
    Value: !GetAtt CentralEventBus.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-CentralEventBusArn"
  InsertPipeName:
    Description: Name of the INSERT events Pipe
    Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InsertPipe"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InsertPipeName"
  InsertPipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the INSERT events Pipe
    Value: !Ref InsertPipe
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-InsertPipeArn"
  ModifyPipeName:
    Description: Name of the MODIFY events Pipe
    Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ModifyPipe"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ModifyPipeName"
  ModifyPipeArn:
    Description: ARN of the MODIFY events Pipe
    Value: !Ref ModifyPipe
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ModifyPipeArn"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for EventBridge-to-Kinesis integration enabling real-time event streaming from application source "my-application" to a scalable Kinesis data stream.

Parameters:
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
  RetentionHours:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 24

Resources:
  MyApplicationEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: MyApplicationEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeKinesisIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  KinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-EventsStream-${AWS::Region}"
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: !Ref RetentionHours
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeKinesisIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  EventBridgeKinesisRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EventBridgeKinesisRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: KinesisPutPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - kinesis:PutRecord
                  - kinesis:PutRecords
                Resource: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeKinesisIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

  RouteMyApplicationEventsRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref MyApplicationEventBus
      Description: Routes events from source "my-application" to Kinesis data stream
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - my-application
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: KinesisTarget1
          Arn: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeKinesisRole.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: EventBridgeKinesisIntegration
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}"

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom EventBridge event bus for application events
    Value: !GetAtt MyApplicationEventBus.Arn
  KinesisStreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis data stream for event ingestion and processing
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
  KinesisStreamName:
    Description: Name of the Kinesis data stream for reference in producers/consumers
    Value: !Ref KinesisStream
  RuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the EventBridge rule routing events to Kinesis
    Value: !GetAtt RouteMyApplicationEventsRule.Arn

Description: |
  CloudFormation template provisioning an EventBridge integration with Shopify's product creation API.
  Captures events from source 'MyShopifyApp' on a custom EventBus and forwards them to Shopify Admin API
  for automated product creation, authenticated via API key.

Parameters:
  ShopifyShopName:
    Type: String
    Default: testanu
    Description: MyShopify domain prefix (e.g., testanu for testanu.myshopify.com)
  ShopifyAdminApiKey:
    Type: String
    Default: "dummy-shopify-token-for-cfn-validation"
    NoEcho: true
    Description: Shopify admin API access token
  ShopifyAPIVersion:
    Type: String
    Default: 2024-04
    Description: Shopify Admin API version

Resources:
  ShopifyEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: ShopifyEventBus
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ShopifyConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: ShopifyConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: X-Shopify-Access-Token
          ApiKeyValue: !Ref ShopifyAdminApiKey

  ShopifyProductCreateDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: ShopifyProductCreateDestination
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt ShopifyConnection.Arn
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationEndpoint: !Sub 'https://${ShopifyShopName}.myshopify.com/admin/api/${ShopifyAPIVersion}/products.json'

  ShopifyProductEventRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Description: Captures events from source MyShopifyApp and invokes Shopify product creation API
      EventBusName: !Ref ShopifyEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - MyShopifyApp
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: ShopifyApiTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt ShopifyProductCreateDestination.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ShopifyEventBridgeIntegration
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: ARN of the custom ShopifyEventBus
    Value: !Ref ShopifyEventBus
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: ARN of the ShopifyProductCreateDestination API Destination
    Value: !GetAtt ShopifyProductCreateDestination.Arn
  RuleArn:
    Description: ARN of the ShopifyProductEventRule
    Value: !Ref ShopifyProductEventRule

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EventBridge integration with Stripe API for automated product creation from PartnerApp events.'

Parameters:
  StripeApiKey:
    Type: String
    NoEcho: true
    Description: 'Stripe API secret key (sk_...)'

Resources:
  PartnerAppDLQ:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      QueueName: 'PartnerAppDLQ'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600

  StripeApiLogs:
    Type: 'AWS::Logs::LogGroup'
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: '/aws/events/StripeApiDestination'
      RetentionInDays: 14

  ApiDestinationLoggingRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: 'ApiDestinationLogsPolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt StripeApiLogs.Arn
                  - !Sub '${StripeApiLogs.Arn}:*'

  PartnerAppEventBus:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::EventBus'
    Properties:
      Name: 'PartnerAppEventBus'

  StripeConnection:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Connection'
    Properties:
      AuthorizationType: 'API_KEY'
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: 'Authorization'
          ApiKeyValue: !Base64 !Sub '${StripeApiKey}:'

  StripeApiDestination:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::ApiDestination'
    Properties:
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt StripeConnection.Arn
      Endpoint: 'https://api.stripe.com/v1/products'
      HttpMethod: 'POST'
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 10
      CloudWatchLogsConfiguration:
        DestinationArn: !GetAtt StripeApiLogs.Arn
        RoleArn: !GetAtt ApiDestinationLoggingRole.Arn

  PartnerAppRule:
    Type: 'AWS::Events::Rule'
    Properties:
      EventBusName: !Ref PartnerAppEventBus
      State: 'ENABLED'
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - 'PartnerApp'
        'detail-type':
          - 'PartnerAppDetailType'
      Targets:
        - Id: 'StripeTarget'
          Arn: !GetAtt StripeApiDestination.Arn
          Type: 'ApiDestination'
          DeadLetterQueue:
            Arn: !Ref PartnerAppDLQ
          RetryPolicy:
            MaximumRetryAttempts: 185
            MaximumEventAgeInSeconds: 86400
          InputTransformer:
            InputPathsMap: '{"name": "$.detail.name", "description": "$.detail.description"}'
            InputTemplate: '{"name": <name>, "description": <description> }'

  PartnerAppDLQPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy'
    Properties:
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !Ref PartnerAppDLQ
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !GetAtt PartnerAppRule.Arn
      Queues:
        - !Ref PartnerAppDLQ

Outputs:
  PartnerAppEventBusArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the PartnerApp EventBus'
    Value: !Ref PartnerAppEventBus
  StripeApiDestinationArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Stripe ApiDestination'
    Value: !GetAtt StripeApiDestination.Arn
  PartnerAppRuleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the PartnerAppRule'
    Value: !GetAtt PartnerAppRule.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Secure REST API Gateway integrated with Amazon DynamoDB for managing music data, enabling Create and Read operations via HTTP endpoints with API key authentication, IAM roles, and usage plan throttling.

Resources:
  MusicTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-Music"
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: id
          KeyType: HASH
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: artist
          AttributeType: S
      GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
        - IndexName: Artist-Index
          KeySchema:
            - AttributeName: artist
              KeyType: HASH
          Projection:
            ProjectionType: ALL

  ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-DynamoDBAccess"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:DescribeTable
                Resource: !GetAtt MusicTable.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:Query
                Resource: !Sub "${MusicTable.Arn}/index/Artist-Index"

  MusicApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MusicApi"
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      MinimumCompressionSize: 1048576

  MusicResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt MusicApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: music

  ArtistResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ParentId: !Ref MusicResource
      PathPart: '{artist}'

  CreateMusicMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MusicResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/PutItem
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: !Sub |
            {
              "TableName": "${MusicTable}",
              "Item": {
                "id": {"S": "$util.autoId()"},
                "artist": {"S": "$input.path('$.artist')"},
                "album": {"S": "$input.path('$.album')"}
              }
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: '{}'

  GetMusicByArtistMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ArtistResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:dynamodb:action/Query
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayDynamoDBRole.Arn
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: !Sub |
            {
              "TableName": "${MusicTable}",
              "IndexName": "Artist-Index",
              "KeyConditionExpression": "artist = :v1",
              "ExpressionAttributeValues": {
                ":v1": $util.dynamodb.toDynamoDBJson($input.params().path.get("artist"))
              }
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: |
                #if( $input.path('$.Items') )
                [
                  #foreach($item in $input.path('$.Items'))
                    $util.dynamodb.toJson($item)#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                  #end
                ]
                #else
                []
                #end

  MusicApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      Description: Initial deployment
    DependsOn:
      - CreateMusicMethod
      - GetMusicByArtistMethod

  MusicApiStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref MusicApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref MusicApiDeployment
      StageName: prod

  MusicApiKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MusicApiKey"
      Enabled: true

  MusicUsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      UsagePlanName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-MusicUsagePlan"
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref MusicApi
          Stage: prod
      Throttle:
        BurstLimit: 200
        RateLimit: 100
      Quota:
        Limit: 10000
        Period: DAY

  MusicUsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      KeyId: !Ref MusicApiKey
      KeyType: API_KEY
      UsagePlanId: !Ref MusicUsagePlan

Outputs:
  ApiGatewayUrl:
    Description: Base URL for the Music API (POST /music for create, GET /music/{artist} for read)
    Value: !Sub https://${MusicApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/music
  ApiKeyValue:
    Description: API Key value required for all requests
    Value: !Ref MusicApiKey
  TableName:
    Description: Name of the DynamoDB Music table
    Value: !Ref MusicTable
  UsagePlanId:
    Description: ID of the Usage Plan
    Value: !Ref MusicUsagePlan

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure REST API Gateway integrated with SES for sending templated emails with validation, API key auth, throttling (500 req/sec, burst 1000), and monthly quota (10,000 requests).'

Resources:
  SecureEmailAPI:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: SecureEmailAPI
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
      BinaryMediaTypes: []

  SendEmailResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref SecureEmailAPI
      ParentId: !GetAtt SecureEmailAPI.RootResourceId
      PathPart: sendemail

  EmailPayloadValidator:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RequestValidator
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref SecureEmailAPI
      Name: EmailPayloadValidator
      ValidateRequestBody: true
      ValidateRequestParameters: false

  EmailRequestModel:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Model
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref SecureEmailAPI
      Name: EmailRequestModel
      ContentType: 'application/json'
      Schema:
        type: object
        required:
          - to
          - from
          - subject
        properties:
          to:
            type: array
            minItems: 1
            maxItems: 50
            items:
              type: string
              format: email
          from:
            type: string
            format: email
          subject:
            type: string
            maxLength: 998
          text:
            type: string
            maxLength: 4194304
          html:
            type: string
            maxLength: 4194304

  ApiGatewaySESRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: ApiGatewaySESRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SESSendEmailPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: ses:SendEmail
                Resource: '*'

  SendEmailPostMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    DependsOn: EmailRequestModel
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref SecureEmailAPI
      ResourceId: !Ref SendEmailResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      ApiKeyRequired: true
      RequestValidatorId: !Ref EmailPayloadValidator
      RequestModels:
        'application/json': 'EmailRequestModel'
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseModels:
            'application/json': 'Empty'
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:ses:action/SendEmail'
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySESRole.Arn
        PassthroughBehavior: NEVER
        RequestTemplates:
          'application/json': |
            {
              "Source": "$util.escapeJavaScript($input.json('from'))",
              "Destination": {
                "ToAddresses": [#foreach($addr in $input.json('to'))"$util.escapeJavaScript($addr)"#if($foreach.hasNext),#end#end]
              },
              "Message": {
                "Subject": {
                  "Data": "$util.escapeJavaScript($input.json('subject'))",
                  "Charset": "UTF-8"
                },
                "Body": {
                  "Text": {
                    "Data": "$util.escapeJavaScript($input.json('text', ''))",
                    "Charset": "UTF-8"
                  }#if($input.json('html')), 
                  "Html": {
                    "Data": "$util.escapeJavaScript($input.json('html'))",
                    "Charset": "UTF-8"
                  }#end
                }
              }
            }
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: '200'
            ResponseTemplates:
              'application/json': |
                #set($inputRoot = $input.path('$'))
                #if($inputRoot.SendEmailResponse && $inputRoot.SendEmailResponse.SendEmailResult && $inputRoot.SendEmailResponse.SendEmailResult.MessageId)
                {
                  "status": "success",
                  "messageId": "$util.escapeJavaScript($inputRoot.SendEmailResponse.SendEmailResult.MessageId)"
                }
                #else
                {
                  "status": "error",
                  "message": "SES SendEmail failed"
                }
                #end

  EmailApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref SecureEmailAPI
      Description: 'Production deployment for SecureEmailAPI'
    DependsOn: SendEmailPostMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref SecureEmailAPI
      DeploymentId: !Ref EmailApiDeployment
      StageName: Prod

  EmailApiKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::ApiKey
    Properties:
      Enabled: true

  EmailUsagePlan:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlan
    Properties:
      UsagePlanName: EmailUsagePlan
      ApiStages:
        - ApiId: !Ref SecureEmailAPI
          Stage: Prod
      Throttle:
        BurstLimit: 1000
        RateLimit: 500
      Quota:
        Limit: 10000
        Period: MONTH

  EmailUsagePlanKey:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::UsagePlanKey
    Properties:
      KeyId: !Ref EmailApiKey
      KeyType: API_KEY
      UsagePlanId: !Ref EmailUsagePlan

Outputs:
  ApiEndpointURL:
    Description: 'Invoke URL for the /sendemail POST endpoint'
    Value: !Sub 'https://${SecureEmailAPI}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/Prod/sendemail'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiEndpointURL'

  ApiKeyId:
    Description: 'API Key ID for authentication. Retrieve the actual key value securely from AWS Console (API Gateway > API Keys) or AWS CLI after stack creation (value is masked and not output for security).'
    Value: !Ref EmailApiKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiKeyId'

  ApiGatewayRoleArn:
    Description: 'IAM Role ARN used by API Gateway to invoke SES'
    Value: !GetAtt ApiGatewaySESRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiGatewayRoleArn'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template provisioning a Kinesis Data Stream and REST API Gateway proxy for HTTP-based Kinesis operations (PutRecord, PutRecords, DescribeStream, ListShards, GetShardIterator, GetRecords) with security, logging, and CORS.'

Parameters:
  StreamName:
    Type: String
    Default: MyKinesisStream
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 128
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+$'
    Description: Name of the Kinesis stream
  ShardCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Number of shards for the Kinesis stream
  ApiName:
    Type: String
    Default: KinesisProxyApi
    MinLength: 1
    MaxLength: 72
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$'
    Description: Name of the API Gateway REST API

Resources:
  KinesisStream:
    Type: AWS::Kinesis::Stream
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub '${StreamName}'
      ShardCount: !Ref ShardCount
      RetentionPeriodHours: 168
      StreamEncryption:
        EncryptionType: KMS
        KeyId: alias/aws/kinesis
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production

  ApiGatewayExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                'AWS:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${KinesisApi}/*/*/*'
              StringEquals:
                'AWS:SourceAccount': !Ref AWS::AccountId

  KinesisAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: KinesisAccessPolicy
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - kinesis:DescribeStream
              - kinesis:GetRecords
              - kinesis:GetShardIterator
              - kinesis:ListShards
              - kinesis:PutRecord
              - kinesis:PutRecords
            Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:kinesis:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stream/${StreamName}'
      Roles:
        - !Ref ApiGatewayExecutionRole

  KinesisApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: !Ref ApiName
      Description: Proxy for Kinesis Data Streams via HTTP
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL

  RootOptionsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !GetAtt KinesisApi.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: OPTIONS
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      Integration:
        Type: MOCK
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {"statusCode": 200}
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Headers: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Methods: true
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true

  StreamsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !GetAtt KinesisApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: streams

  ProxyStreamResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref StreamsResource
      PathPart: '{stream}'

  ShardsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref ProxyStreamResource
      PathPart: shards

  ProxyShardResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref ShardsResource
      PathPart: '{shard}'

  StreamDescribeResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref ProxyStreamResource
      PathPart: describe

  StreamPutResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref ProxyStreamResource
      PathPart: put

  StreamRecordsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref ProxyStreamResource
      PathPart: records

  ShardIteratorResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref ProxyShardResource
      PathPart: iterator

  ShardRecordsResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ParentId: !Ref ProxyShardResource
      PathPart: records

  DescribeStreamMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref StreamDescribeResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.stream: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayExecutionRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/DescribeStream'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')"
            }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
            method.response.header.Content-Type: true

  PutRecordMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref StreamPutResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.stream: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayExecutionRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecord'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            #set($bodyObject = $util.parseJson($input.body))
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')",
              "Data": "$util.base64Encode($bodyObject.data)",
              "PartitionKey": "$bodyObject.partitionKey"
              #if($bodyObject.explicitHashKey)
              ,"ExplicitHashKey": "$bodyObject.explicitHashKey"
              #end
            }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
            method.response.header.Content-Type: true

  PutRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref StreamRecordsResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.stream: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayExecutionRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/PutRecords'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            #set($bodyObject = $util.parseJson($input.body))
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')",
              "Records": [
                #foreach($record in $bodyObject.records)
                {
                  "Data": "$util.base64Encode($record.data)",
                  "PartitionKey": "$record.partitionKey"
                  #if($record.explicitHashKey)
                  ,"ExplicitHashKey": "$record.explicitHashKey"
                  #end
                }#if($foreach.hasNext),#end
                #end
              ]
            }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
            method.response.header.Content-Type: true

  ListShardsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ShardsResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.stream: true
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayExecutionRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/ListShards'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')"
            }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
            method.response.header.Content-Type: true

  GetShardIteratorMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ShardIteratorResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.stream: true
        method.request.path.shard: true
        method.request.querystring.shardIteratorType: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayExecutionRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetShardIterator'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')",
              "ShardId": "$input.params('shard')",
              "ShardIteratorType": "$input.params('shardIteratorType') ?: 'TRIM_HORIZON'"
            }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
            method.response.header.Content-Type: true

  GetRecordsMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      ResourceId: !Ref ShardRecordsResource
      HttpMethod: POST
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.path.stream: true
        method.request.path.shard: true
        method.request.querystring.shardIterator: true
        method.request.querystring.limit: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiGatewayExecutionRole.Arn
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub 'arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:kinesis:action/GetRecords'
        PassthroughBehavior: WHEN_NO_MATCH
        RequestTemplates:
          application/json: |
            {
              "ShardIterator": "$input.params('shardIterator')",
              #if($input.params('limit'))
              "Limit": $input.params('limit'),
              #end
              "StreamName": "$input.params('stream')"
            }
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: '200'
          ResponseParameters:
            method.response.header.Access-Control-Allow-Origin: true
            method.response.header.Content-Type: true

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      Description: !Sub 'Deployment for ${AWS::StackName}'
    DependsOn:
      - RootOptionsMethod
      - DescribeStreamMethod
      - PutRecordMethod
      - PutRecordsMethod
      - ListShardsMethod
      - GetShardIteratorMethod
      - GetRecordsMethod

  ProdStage:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Stage
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref KinesisApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: prod
      TracingEnabled: true

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: Invoke URL for the Kinesis Proxy API
    Value: !Sub 'https://${KinesisApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod/'
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ApiEndpoint'

  StreamArn:
    Description: ARN of the Kinesis Stream
    Value: !GetAtt KinesisStream.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-StreamArn'

Description: 'Basic EFS FileSystem for testing in us-east-1a'

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16

      EnableDnsSupport: true

          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

          Value: Testing

  MyIGW:

        - Key: Name

  MyVPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC

  PublicSubnetusEast1a:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Sub '${AWS::Region}a'
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet-${AWS::Region}a'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable

      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC

        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Testing

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref MyIGW

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnetusEast1a

    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:

        - IpProtocol: tcp

    Value: !Ref PublicSubnetusEast1a
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnetId'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Automated Security Hub control manager for selective disabling of CIS and FSBP checks"

Parameters:
  CISStandardArn:
    Type: String
    Default: "arn:aws:securityhub:::ruleset/cis-aws-foundations-benchmark/v/1.4.0"
    Description: "ARN of the CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark standard"
  FSBPStandardArn:
    Type: String
    Default: "arn:aws:securityhub:us-east-1::standards/aws-foundational-security-best-practices/v/1.0.0"
    Description: "ARN of the AWS Foundational Security Best Practices standard"
  ControlsToDisable:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: ""
    Description: "Comma-separated list of control IDs to disable (e.g., 1.40,3.1)"
  PermissionsBoundaryArn:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "ARN of the IAM permissions boundary to apply to the Lambda execution role (optional)"
  LogRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: "Retention period in days for CloudWatch Logs"

Conditions:
  HasPermissionsBoundary: !Not [!Equals [!Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn, ""]]

Resources:
  SecurityHubControlManagerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubControlManagerRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [HasPermissionsBoundary, !Ref PermissionsBoundaryArn, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubControlPolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - securityhub:DescribeStandards
                  - securityhub:DescribeStandardsControls
                  - securityhub:UpdateStandardsControl
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecurityHubControlManager

  SecurityHubControlManagerLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub "/aws/lambda/${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubControlManager"
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionDays
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecurityHubControlManager

  SecurityHubControlManagerFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-SecurityHubControlManager"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Role: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerRole.Arn
      Handler: lambda_function.lambda_handler
      Timeout: 300
      MemorySize: 512
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              sh = boto3.client('securityhub')
              cis_arn = os.environ['CIS_STANDARD_ARN']
              fsbp_arn = os.environ['FSBP_STANDARD_ARN']
              controls_str = os.environ['CONTROLS_TO_DISABLE']
              controls = [c.strip() for c in controls_str.split(',') if c.strip()]
              standards = [cis_arn, fsbp_arn]

              for std_arn in standards:
                  try:
                      controls_resp = sh.describe_standards_controls(StandardsArn=std_arn)
                      std_controls = controls_resp['Controls']
                      for control_id in controls:
                          for ctrl in std_controls:
                              if ctrl['Id'] == control_id:
                                  if not ctrl.get('Disabled', False):
                                      sh.update_standards_control(
                                          StandardsArn=std_arn,
                                          StandardsControlId=control_id,
                                          Disabled=True,
                                          DisabledReason='Tailored to organizational requirements'
                                      )
                                      print(f"Disabled control {control_id} in {std_arn}")
                                  break
                  except Exception as e:
                      print(f"Error processing standard {std_arn}: {str(e)}")

              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps('Security Hub controls updated successfully')
              }
      Environment:
        Variables:
          CIS_STANDARD_ARN: !Ref CISStandardArn
          FSBP_STANDARD_ARN: !Ref FSBPStandardArn
          CONTROLS_TO_DISABLE: !Join [",", !Ref ControlsToDisable]
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: SecurityHubControlManager

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Lambda function to invoke for managing Security Hub controls"
    Value: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerFunction.Arn
  IamRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of the IAM role used by the Lambda function"
    Value: !GetAtt SecurityHubControlManagerRole.Arn
  LogGroupName:
    Description: "Name of the CloudWatch Log Group for the Lambda function"
    Value: !Ref SecurityHubControlManagerLogGroup

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'This template enforces an account-wide IAM password policy with customizable security requirements and a Lambda function for dynamic apply/remove operations via AWS SDK.'

Parameters:
  MinimumPasswordLength:
    Type: Number
    Default: 14
    MinValue: 4
    MaxValue: 128
    Description: 'Minimum password length (4-128 characters)'
  RequireUppercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Require uppercase characters'
  RequireLowercaseCharacters:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Require lowercase characters'
  RequireNumbers:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Require numbers'
  RequireSymbols:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Require symbols'
  MaxPasswordAge:
    Type: Number
    Default: 90
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1095
    Description: 'Maximum password age in days (0-1095)'
  PasswordReusePrevention:
    Type: Number
    Default: 24
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 24
    Description: 'Number of previous passwords to prevent reuse (0-24)'
  AllowUsersPasswordReset:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: 'Allow users to change their own password'
  EnablePermissionBoundary:
    Type: String
    Default: 'No'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'Yes'
      - 'No'
    Description: 'Enable permission boundary for Lambda role'

Conditions:
  EnablePermissionBoundaryYes: !Equals [!Ref EnablePermissionBoundary, 'Yes']

Resources:
  PasswordPolicyLambdaRole:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role'
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      MaxSessionDuration: 3600
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole'
      PermissionsBoundary: !If [EnablePermissionBoundaryYes, !Ref LambdaPermissionBoundary, !Ref 'AWS::NoValue']
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: IAMPWPolicy

  PasswordPolicyLambdaPolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaPolicy'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'iam:GetAccountPasswordPolicy'
              - 'iam:UpdateAccountPasswordPolicy'
              - 'iam:DeleteAccountPasswordPolicy'
            Resource: '*'
      Roles:
        - !Ref PasswordPolicyLambdaRole

  LambdaPermissionBoundary:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy'
    Condition: EnablePermissionBoundaryYes
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LambdaPermissionBoundary'
      Description: 'Permission boundary limiting Lambda to IAM password policy actions only'
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'iam:GetAccountPasswordPolicy'
              - 'iam:UpdateAccountPasswordPolicy'
              - 'iam:DeleteAccountPasswordPolicy'
            Resource: '*'

  PasswordPolicyManager:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Function'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PasswordPolicyManager'
      Role: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyLambdaRole.Arn
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Runtime: python3.12
      Timeout: 30
      Environment:
        Variables:
          MIN_LENGTH: !Ref MinimumPasswordLength
          REQ_UPPER: !Ref RequireUppercaseCharacters
          REQ_LOWER: !Ref RequireLowercaseCharacters
          REQ_NUMBERS: !Ref RequireNumbers
          REQ_SYMBOLS: !Ref RequireSymbols
          MAX_AGE: !Ref MaxPasswordAge
          REUSE_PREV: !Ref PasswordReusePrevention
          ALLOW_RESET: !Ref AllowUsersPasswordReset
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              try:
                  action = event.get('action')
                  if action not in ['apply', 'remove']:
                      return {
                          'statusCode': 400,
                          'body': json.dumps({'error': 'Invalid action. Use "apply" or "remove".'})
                      }
                  iam = boto3.client('iam')
                  if action == 'apply':
                      policy = {
                          'MinimumPasswordLength': int(os.environ['MIN_LENGTH']),
                          'RequireUppercaseCharacters': os.environ['REQ_UPPER'].lower() == 'true',
                          'RequireLowercaseCharacters': os.environ['REQ_LOWER'].lower() == 'true',
                          'RequireNumbers': os.environ['REQ_NUMBERS'].lower() == 'true',
                          'RequireSymbols': os.environ['REQ_SYMBOLS'].lower() == 'true',
                          'MaxPasswordAge': int(os.environ['MAX_AGE']),
                          'PasswordReusePrevention': int(os.environ['REUSE_PREV']),
                          'AllowUsersToChangePassword': os.environ['ALLOW_RESET'].lower() == 'true'
                      }
                      iam.update_account_password_policy(**policy)
                      return {
                          'statusCode': 200,
                          'body': json.dumps({'message': 'Password policy applied successfully'})
                      }
                  elif action == 'remove':
                      iam.delete_account_password_policy()
                      return {
                          'statusCode': 200,
                          'body': json.dumps({'message': 'Password policy removed successfully'})
                      }
              except Exception as e:
                  return {
                      'statusCode': 500,
                      'body': json.dumps({'error': str(e)})
                  }
      Tags:
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Project
          Value: IAMPWPolicy

  InvokePermission:
    Type: 'AWS::Lambda::Permission'
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref PasswordPolicyManager
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: '*'

Outputs:
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Password Policy Manager Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyManager.Arn
  LambdaRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda execution role'
    Value: !GetAtt PasswordPolicyLambdaRole.Arn
