final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Centralized SNS Alerting System

Parameters:
  PrimaryTopicName:
    Type: String
    Default: CentralAlertingTopic
    Description: Name for the primary SNS topic
  PrimaryEmail:
    Type: String
    Default: 'primary@example.com'
    Description: Primary email endpoint for alerts (optional; override default placeholder if needed)
  HttpsEndpoint:
    Type: String
    Default: 'https://example.com/webhook'
    Description: HTTPS webhook endpoint for alerts (optional; override default placeholder if needed)
  FallbackEmail:
    Type: String
    Default: 'fallback@example.com'
    Description: Fallback email endpoint for redundancy (required; override default placeholder with valid address)
  AlarmThreshold:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    Description: Threshold for failed notifications alarm
  AlarmPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60
    Description: Period in seconds for the alarm evaluation
  EnableDLQ:
    Type: String
    Default: "no"
    AllowedValues: ["yes", "no"]
    Description: Whether to create a Dead Letter Queue for HTTPS subscription

Conditions:
  HasDeadLetterQueue: !Equals
    - !Ref EnableDLQ
    - "no"

Resources:
  SnsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SNS-Key'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "EnableRoot",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
              },
              "Action": "kms:*",
              "Resource": "*"
            },
            {
              "Sid": "AllowSNS",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "Service": "sns.amazonaws.com"
              },
              "Action": [
                "kms:GenerateDataKey*",
                "kms:Decrypt"
              ],
              "Resource": "*"
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralAlerting

  SqsKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SQS-Key'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      KeyPolicy: !Sub |
        {
          "Version": "2012-10-17",
          "Statement": [
            {
              "Sid": "EnableRoot",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root"
              },
              "Action": "kms:*",
              "Resource": "*"
            },
            {
              "Sid": "AllowSQS",
              "Effect": "Allow",
              "Principal": {
                "Service": "sqs.amazonaws.com"
              },
              "Action": [
                "kms:GenerateDataKey*",
                "kms:Decrypt"
              ],
              "Resource": "*"
            }
          ]
        }
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralAlerting

  PrimarySNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-${PrimaryTopicName}'
      DisplayName: Centralized Alerting
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SnsKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralAlerting

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Condition: HasDeadLetterQueue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQ'
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SqsKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralAlerting

  PrimaryTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCloudWatchAlarms
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: cloudwatch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:cloudwatch:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:alarm:*'
          - Sid: AllowRDSEvents
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:rds:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*'
          - Sid: AllowS3Notifications
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: 'arn:aws:s3:::*'
          - Sid: AllowBudgetsAlerts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: budgets.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicArn
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
              ArnLike:
                aws:SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:budgets:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*'

  PrimaryEmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !Ref PrimaryEmail
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  HttpsSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !Ref HttpsEndpoint
      Protocol: https
      TopicArn: !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      DeliveryPolicy: |
        {
          "http": {
            "connectionTimeout": 20,
            "defaultHealthyRetryPolicy": {
              "numRetries": 5,
              "minDelayTarget": 1,
              "maxDelayTarget": 900,
              "backoffRate": "2.0"
            },
            "defaultUnhealthyRetryPolicy": {
              "numRetries": 5,
              "minDelayTarget": 1,
              "maxDelayTarget": 900,
              "backoffRate": "2.0"
            }
          }
        }
      RedrivePolicy: !If
        - HasDeadLetterQueue
        - !Sub
          - '{"deadLetterTargetArn": "${DLQArn}"}'
          - DLQArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'

  FallbackSNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FallbackTopic'
      DisplayName: Alerting Fallback
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref SnsKmsKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralAlerting

  FallbackEmailSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !Ref FallbackEmail
      Protocol: email
      TopicArn: !Ref FallbackSNSTopic
      RawMessageDelivery: true

  FailedNotificationsAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-FailedNotificationsAlarm'
      AlarmDescription: Triggers fallback on failed notifications from primary topic
      Namespace: AWS/SNS
      MetricName: NumberOfNotificationsFailed
      Dimensions:
        - Name: TopicName
          Value: !GetAtt PrimarySNSTopic.TopicName
      Period: !Ref AlarmPeriod
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Statistic: Sum
      Threshold: !Ref AlarmThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref FallbackSNSTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CentralAlerting

Outputs:
  PrimaryTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the primary SNS topic. Use this to configure alarms, events, etc.
    Value: !Ref PrimarySNSTopic
  FallbackTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the fallback SNS topic triggered by failed notifications alarm
    Value: !Ref FallbackSNSTopic
  PrimaryEmailSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the primary email subscription
    Value: !Ref PrimaryEmailSubscription
  HttpsSubscriptionArn:
    Description: ARN of the HTTPS subscription
    Value: !Ref HttpsSubscription
  AlarmName:
    Description: Name of the CloudWatch Alarm monitoring failed notifications
    Value: !Ref FailedNotificationsAlarm

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for AWS Batch environment automating scalable data processing tasks (e.g., S3 file operations) with VPC, S3 bucket, Compute Environment (EC2 m5.large), Job Queue, and Job Definition.'

Parameters:
  ImageTag:
    Type: String
    Default: '2'
  VpcCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: '10.0.0.0/16'

Resources:
  # VPC and Networking
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidr
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet'

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  BatchSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for AWS Batch compute environment'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BatchSG'

  # KMS Key for S3
  S3KMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for S3 bucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:Decrypt
            Resource: '*'

  # S3 Bucket
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref S3KMSKey

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false

  # IAM Roles
  BatchServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: batch.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSBatchServiceRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BatchServiceRole'

  BatchInstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2ContainerServiceforEC2Role
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BatchInstanceRole'

  BatchInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref BatchInstanceRole

  BatchJobRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: S3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt S3Bucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${S3Bucket.Arn}/*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-BatchJobRole'

  # AWS Batch Components
  BatchComputeEnv:
    Type: AWS::Batch::ComputeEnvironment
    Properties:
      Type: MANAGED
      ServiceRole: !GetAtt BatchServiceRole.Arn
      ComputeResources:
        Type: EC2
        MinvCpus: 0
        MaxvCpus: 16
        InstanceTypes:
          - m5.large
        Subnets:
          - !Ref PublicSubnet
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref BatchSecurityGroup
        InstanceRole: !GetAtt BatchInstanceProfile.Arn
      Tags:
        Name: BatchComputeEnv

  BatchJobQueue:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobQueue
    Properties:
      Priority: 1
      ComputeEnvironmentOrder:
        - Order: 1
          ComputeEnvironment: !GetAtt BatchComputeEnv.ComputeEnvironmentArn
      Tags:
        Name: BatchJobQueue

  SampleS3Job:
    Type: AWS::Batch::JobDefinition
    Properties:
      Type: container
      JobDefinitionName: SampleS3Job
      RetryStrategy:
        Attempts: 3
      ContainerProperties:
        Image: !Sub 'amazonlinux:${ImageTag}'
        Vcpus: 2
        Memory: 4096
        JobRoleArn: !GetAtt BatchJobRole.Arn
        Command:
          - /bin/sh
          - -c
          - 'yum update -y && yum install -y aws-cli && aws s3 cp s3://${BUCKET_NAME}/input/sample.txt /tmp/output.txt && aws s3 cp /tmp/output.txt s3://${BUCKET_NAME}/output/sample.txt'
        Environment:
          - Name: BUCKET_NAME
            Value: !Ref S3Bucket
        LogConfiguration:
          LogDriver: awslogs
          Options:
            awslogs-group: /aws/batch/job
            awslogs-region: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
            awslogs-stream-prefix: aws-batch
      Tags:
        Name: SampleS3Job

Outputs:
  ComputeEnvironmentArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch Compute Environment
    Value: !GetAtt BatchComputeEnv.ComputeEnvironmentArn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ComputeEnvironmentArn'

  JobQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch Job Queue
    Value: !GetAtt BatchJobQueue.JobQueueArn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JobQueueArn'

  JobDefinitionArn:
    Description: ARN of the AWS Batch Job Definition
    Value: !GetAtt SampleS3Job.JobDefinitionArn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JobDefinitionArn'

  S3BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket for input/output
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-S3BucketName'

  VpcId:
    Description: ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VpcId'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Basic Lambda function with Node.js inline code and CloudWatch Logs execution role'

Resources:
  LambdaBasicExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  BasicLambdaFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Runtime: nodejs20.x
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
              console.log('Received event:', JSON.stringify(event, null, 2));
              return event.value || { statusCode: 200, body: 'Hello from Lambda!' };
          };
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaBasicExecutionRole.Arn
      Timeout: 3
      MemorySize: 128

Outputs:
  BasicLambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the basic Lambda function for invocation
    Value: !GetAtt BasicLambdaFunction.Arn

Description: CloudFront distribution fronting a regional API Gateway REST API with /hello GET mock endpoint returning Hello World JSON, production stage, HTTPS-only origin, viewer HTTPS redirect, and no caching.

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates an IAM role with configurable permission boundaries which enforces governance controls for developer-created IAM resources.

Parameters:
  EnableStrictBoundary:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - "Yes"
      - "No"
    Default: "No"
    Description: Toggle to enable (Yes) or disable (No) strict permission boundary enforcement.
  TeamPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: MyTeam
    Description: Prefix for naming developer-managed IAM roles and policies.
  OwnerTagValue:
    Type: String
    Default: MyTeam
    Description: Value for the mandatory Owner tag on developer-managed IAM resources.

Conditions:
  StrictMode: !Equals [!Ref EnableStrictBoundary, "No"]

Resources:
  PermissionsBoundaryPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      Description: 'Default permission boundary restricting developer roles to S3:* and IAM read-only operations.'
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub "${TeamPrefix}-DefaultBoundary"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: s3:*
            Resource: '*'
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - iam:Get*
              - iam:List*
            Resource: '*'

  DeveloperRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${TeamPrefix}-DeveloperRole"
      Path: "/"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      PermissionsBoundary:
        Fn::If:
          - StrictMode
          - !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}-DefaultBoundary"
          - Ref: AWS::NoValue
      Tags:
        - Key: Owner
          Value: !Ref OwnerTagValue
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: ConditionalIAMPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Fn::If:
              - StrictMode
              -
                Version: '2012-10-17'
                Statement:
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - iam:Get*
                      - iam:List*
                    Resource: '*'
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - iam:UpdateRole
                      - iam:DeleteRole
                      - iam:TagRole
                      - iam:UntagRole
                    Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*"
                    Condition:
                      StringEquals:
                        aws:RequestTag/Owner: !Ref OwnerTagValue
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action: iam:CreateRole
                    Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*"
                    Condition:
                      StringEquals:
                        aws:RequestTag/Owner: !Ref OwnerTagValue
                        iam:PermissionsBoundary: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}-DefaultBoundary"
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - iam:CreatePolicy
                      - iam:DeletePolicy
                      - iam:CreatePolicyVersion
                      - iam:TagPolicy
                      - iam:UntagPolicy
                    Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}*"
                    Condition:
                      StringEquals:
                        aws:RequestTag/Owner: !Ref OwnerTagValue
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - iam:AttachRolePolicy
                      - iam:DetachRolePolicy
                      - iam:PutRolePermissionsBoundary
                      - iam:DeleteRolePermissionsBoundary
                      - iam:PassRole
                    Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*"
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action:
                      - iam:PutRolePolicy
                      - iam:DeleteRolePolicy
                    Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:role/${TeamPrefix}*"
                    Condition:
                      StringEquals:
                        aws:RequestTag/Owner: !Ref OwnerTagValue
              -
                Version: '2012-10-17'
                Statement:
                  - Effect: Allow
                    Action: iam:*
                    Resource: '*'

Outputs:
  DeveloperRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the DeveloperRole for integration
    Value: !GetAtt DeveloperRole.Arn
  PermissionsBoundaryPolicyArn:
    Description: ARN of the default permission boundary policy for developer-created roles
    Value: !If [StrictMode, !Sub "arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:policy/${TeamPrefix}-DefaultBoundary", 'Not applicable in permissive mode']

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys an AppSync GraphQL API named PetShopAPI with a Lambda backend providing a serverless pet inventory query service using mock data.'

Parameters:
  LambdaRuntime:
    Type: String
    Default: nodejs20.x
    Description: The runtime environment for the Lambda function
    AllowedValues:
      - nodejs20.x
      - nodejs24.x

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PetShop
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  PetInventoryLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          const pets = [
            {"id": "1", "name": "Fluffy", "type": "Cat"},
            {"id": "2", "name": "Buddy", "type": "Dog"},
            {"id": "3", "name": "Whiskers", "type": "Cat"},
            {"id": "4", "name": "Max", "type": "Dog"}
          ];
          exports.handler = async (event) => {
            return {
              statusCode: 200,
              body: JSON.stringify(pets)
            };
          };
      Handler: index.handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: !Ref LambdaRuntime
      Timeout: 10
      MemorySize: 128
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PetShop
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  AppSyncServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: appsync.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:SourceAccount':
                  !Ref AWS::AccountId
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InvokePetLambdaPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PetShop
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  PetShopAPI:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLApi
    Properties:
      Name: PetShopAPI
      AuthenticationType: API_KEY
      XrayEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: PetShop
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}'

  PetApiKey:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::ApiKey
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      Description: API Key for anonymous access to PetShopAPI
      Expires: 1893456000
    DependsOn: PetGraphQLSchema

  PetGraphQLSchema:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::GraphQLSchema
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      Definition: |
        type Pet {
          id: ID!
          name: String!
          type: String!
        }

        type Query {
          getPets: [Pet!]!
        }

  PetLambdaDataSource:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::DataSource
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      Name: PetLambdaDataSource
      Type: AWS_LAMBDA
      LambdaConfig:
        LambdaFunctionArn: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
      ServiceRoleArn: !GetAtt AppSyncServiceRole.Arn

  PetLambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: appsync.amazonaws.com
      SourceAccount: !Ref AWS::AccountId
      SourceArn: !Sub '${PetShopAPI.Arn}/datasources/PetLambdaDataSource/*'

  PetResolver:
    Type: AWS::AppSync::Resolver
    Properties:
      ApiId: !Ref PetShopAPI
      DataSourceName: !Ref PetLambdaDataSource
      FieldName: getPets
      TypeName: Query
      RequestMappingTemplate: "$util.toJson($context.arguments)"
      ResponseMappingTemplate: "$util.toJson($ctx.result.body ? $util.parseJson($ctx.result.body) : [])"

Outputs:
  GraphQLURL:
    Description: The GraphQL API endpoint URL
    Value: !GetAtt PetShopAPI.GraphQLUrl
  GraphQLApiId:
    Description: The AppSync GraphQL API ID
    Value: !Ref PetShopAPI
  ApiKey:
    Description: The API Key value for authentication
    Value: !GetAtt PetApiKey.ApiKey
  ApiKeyId:
    Description: The API Key ID
    Value: !Ref PetApiKey
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt PetInventoryLambda.Arn

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template demonstrating a custom resource backed by Lambda for dynamic arithmetic operations (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division) based on parameters, with conditional failure simulation for testing.

Parameters:
  FirstNumber:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1000
  SecondNumber:
    Type: Number
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 1000
  Operator:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['+', '-', '*', '/']
  FailOnPurpose:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues: ['Yes', 'No']
    Default: 'No'

Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ArithmeticCustomResourceDemo

  ArithmeticCustomResourceLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-ArithmeticCustomResourceLambda"
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Timeout: 30
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import urllib.request
          import urllib.error
          import traceback

          def send(event, context, success=True, data=None, physical_resource_id=None, reason=None):
              if not success:
                  reason = reason or "See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream: " + context.log_stream_name
                  response_data = {}
                  status = "FAILED"
              else:
                  reason = "See the details in CloudWatch Log Stream: " + context.log_stream_name
                  response_data = data or {}
                  status = "SUCCESS"

              physical_resource_id = physical_resource_id or event.get('PhysicalResourceId') or event['LogicalResourceId']

              response_body = {
                  'Status': status,
                  'Reason': reason,
                  'PhysicalResourceId': physical_resource_id,
                  'StackId': event['StackId'],
                  'RequestId': event['RequestId'],
                  'LogicalResourceId': event['LogicalResourceId'],
                  'Data': response_data
              }

              json_response_body = json.dumps(response_body)

              print("Response body:\n" + json_response_body)

              headers = {
                  'content-type': '',
                  'content-length': str(len(json_response_body))
              }

              try:
                  req = urllib.request.Request(event['ResponseURL'], data=json_response_body.encode('utf-8'), method='PUT')
                  for key in headers:
                      req.add_header(key, headers[key])
                  with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120) as response:
                      print(response.read())
                  print("cfn-response: " + status)
              except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
                  print("cfn-response: failed to send response data: " + str(e))
                  raise

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              try:
                  props = event['ResourceProperties']
                  request_type = event['RequestType']

                  if request_type == 'Delete':
                      send(event, context, physical_resource_id=event['PhysicalResourceId'])
                      return

                  first_number = int(props['FirstNumber'])
                  second_number = int(props['SecondNumber'])
                  operator = props['Operator']
                  fail_on_purpose = props.get('FailOnPurpose', 'No')

                  if fail_on_purpose == 'Yes':
                      send(event, context, success=False, reason="Simulated failure for testing")
                      return

                  stack_id = event['StackId']
                  stack_name = stack_id.split('/')[-2]
                  physical_resource_id = f"{stack_name}-helper-{stack_id}"

                  if operator == '+':
                      result = first_number + second_number
                  elif operator == '-':
                      result = first_number - second_number
                  elif operator == '*':
                      result = first_number * second_number
                  elif operator == '/':
                      if second_number == 0:
                          send(event, context, success=False, reason="Division by zero error", physical_resource_id=physical_resource_id)
                          return
                      result = first_number / second_number
                  else:
                      send(event, context, success=False, reason="Invalid operator", physical_resource_id=physical_resource_id)
                      return

                  send(event, context, data={'Result': result}, physical_resource_id=physical_resource_id)

              except Exception as e:
                  print("Exception: " + str(e))
                  traceback.print_exc()
                  send(event, context, success=False, reason=str(e))
      Tags:
        - Key: Project
          Value: ArithmeticCustomResourceDemo

  ArithmeticHelper:
    Type: AWS::CloudFormation::CustomResource
    Properties:
      ServiceToken: !GetAtt ArithmeticCustomResourceLambda.Arn
      FirstNumber: !Ref FirstNumber
      SecondNumber: !Ref SecondNumber
      Operator: !Ref Operator
      FailOnPurpose: !Ref FailOnPurpose

Outputs:
  CalculationResult:
    Value: !GetAtt ArithmeticHelper.Result
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Value: !GetAtt ArithmeticCustomResourceLambda.Arn
  CustomResourcePhysicalId:
    Value: !Ref ArithmeticHelper

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'CloudFormation template for EC2 Auto Scaling Groups with SSM-managed Linux (Amazon Linux 2) and Windows instances in public subnets, using dynamic AMIs from SSM Parameter Store.'

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'

  IGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRT'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref IGW

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: 'Security group for EC2 instances allowing HTTP, SSH/RDP from VPC, and outbound HTTPS for SSM'
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3389
          ToPort: 3389
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-EC2SG'

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMInlinePolicy'
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssm:UpdateInstanceInformation
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ssmmessages:CreateControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:CreateDataChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenControlChannel
                  - ssmmessages:OpenDataChannel
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SSMRole'

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  LinuxLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LinuxLT'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2:1}}'
        InstanceType: t3.micro
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: 'required'
          HttpEndpoint: 'enabled'
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref SecurityGroup
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LinuxLT'

  WindowsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WindowsLT'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base:1}}'
        InstanceType: m5.large
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref InstanceProfile
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: 'required'
          HttpEndpoint: 'enabled'
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: 0
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
            Groups:
              - !Ref SecurityGroup
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            <powershell>
            Restart-Service AmazonSSMAgent -Force
            </powershell>
      TagSpecifications:
        - ResourceType: launch-template
          Tags:
            - Key: Name
              Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WindowsLT'

  LinuxASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LinuxASG'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LinuxLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LinuxLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-LinuxASG'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  WindowsASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WindowsASG'
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WindowsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WindowsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '2'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-WindowsASG'
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  LinuxASG:
    Description: Linux Auto Scaling Group Name
    Value: !Ref LinuxASG
  WindowsASG:
    Description: Windows Auto Scaling Group Name
    Value: !Ref WindowsASG
  LinuxLaunchTemplateVersion:
    Description: Linux Launch Template Latest Version
    Value: !GetAtt LinuxLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
  WindowsLaunchTemplateVersion:
    Description: Windows Launch Template Latest Version
    Value: !GetAtt WindowsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
  SSMRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the SSM IAM Role
    Value: !GetAtt SSMRole.Arn
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref SecurityGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure S3 static website with CloudFront CDN integration, OAI for secure access, HTTPS enforcement, caching disabled, and Lambda CustomResource for automated content population/cleanup.'

Resources:
  StaticSiteKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: 'KMS key for StaticSiteBucket encryption'
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow access for S3 service
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - kms:Encrypt
              - kms:Decrypt
              - kms:ReEncrypt*
              - kms:GenerateDataKey*
              - kms:DescribeKey
            Resource: '*'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:ViaAWSService': 's3.amazonaws.com'
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Sub 'arn:aws:s3:::${AWS::StackName}-static-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      EnableKeyRotation: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Stack
          Value: !Ref AWS::StackName

  StaticSiteBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-static-bucket-${AWS::Region}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: aws:kms
              KMSMasterKeyID: !Ref StaticSiteKey
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Jenkins HA deployment across multiple AZs with Auto Scaling Group, public subnets, SSM integration, and secure networking.'
Mappings:

    us-east-2:

    us-west-2:

Resources:
  JenkinsVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-VPC'
        - Key: Project
          Value: JenkinsHA
  JenkinsIGW:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-IGW'
        - Key: Project
          Value: JenkinsHA
  JenkinsIGWAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref JenkinsIGW
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 0
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet1'
        - Key: Project
          Value: JenkinsHA
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      AvailabilityZone: !Select
        - 1
        - !GetAZs ''
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicSubnet2'
        - Key: Project
          Value: JenkinsHA
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PublicRouteTable'
        - Key: Project
          Value: JenkinsHA
  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref JenkinsIGW
  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:

      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  JenkinsNACL:

  InboundRule100SSH:

      RuleAction: allow
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      PortRange:
        From: 1024
        To: 65535
      Egress: false

    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry

      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry

      RuleAction: allow

        From: 0

  OutboundRule410UDP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref JenkinsNACL

      Protocol: 17
      RuleAction: allow

      PortRange:
        From: 0

    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry

    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref JenkinsNACL

    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:

      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 10.0.0.0/16
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
  JenkinsEC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:

            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole

  JenkinsInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref JenkinsEC2Role
  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsLaunchTemplate'
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !FindInMap
          - AWSRegionToAMI
          - !Ref 'AWS::Region'
          - AmazonLinux2
        InstanceType: t3.small
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Name: !Ref JenkinsInstanceProfile
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
        NetworkInterfaces:
          - DeviceIndex: '0'
            Groups:
              - !Ref JenkinsSG
            AssociatePublicIpAddress: true
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-JenkinsInstance"
              - Key: Project
                Value: JenkinsHA
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash -ex
            exec > >(tee /var/log/user-data.log|logger -t user-data -s 2>/dev/console) 2>&1
            yum update -y
            yum install -y java-17-amazon-corretto
            curl -fsSL https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo | tee /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo > /dev/null
            rpm --import https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.io-2023.key
            yum install -y jenkins
            systemctl daemon-reload
            systemctl enable jenkins
            systemctl start jenkins
            timeout 600 bash -c 'while [ ! -f /var/lib/jenkins/secrets/initialAdminPassword ]; do sleep 10; done'
            initialPassword=$(cat /var/lib/jenkins/secrets/initialAdminPassword)
            echo "Jenkins initial admin password: $initialPassword" > /home/ec2-user/jenkins-password.txt
            chmod 644 /home/ec2-user/jenkins-password.txt
            chown ec2-user:ec2-user /home/ec2-user/jenkins-password.txt
  JenkinsASG:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt JenkinsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: '1'
      MaxSize: '3'
      DesiredCapacity: '1'
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
Outputs:
  JenkinsASG:
    Description: The Auto Scaling Group name for the Jenkins deployment
    Value: !Ref JenkinsASG
  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Description: The Launch Template ID used by the Jenkins ASG
    Value: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
  JenkinsURL:
    Description: Jenkins access URL (obtain Public IP from EC2 console under ASG instances)
    Value: 'http://[INSTANCE_PUBLIC_IP]:8080'

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Deploys a Bedrock Agent integrated with a Lambda function for automated stock price lookup using Claude 3 Sonnet foundation model.'
Metadata:
  cfn-lint:
    config:
      ignore_checks:
        - E3006
Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole

  GetStockPriceLambda:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: GetStockPriceLambda
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.handler
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json

          def handler(event, context):
              symbol = event.get('parameters', {}).get('symbol', 'UNKNOWN')
              return {
                  "stockSymbol": symbol,
                  "price": 100.0
              }
      Timeout: 30
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn

  BedrockAgentServiceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: BedrockAgentServiceRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockAgentInlinePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: bedrock:InvokeModel
                Resource: 'arn:aws:bedrock:*:*:foundation-model/anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:lambda:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:function:GetStockPriceLambda'

  BedrockInvokeLambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref GetStockPriceLambda
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: bedrock.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !Sub 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:agent/${StockLookupAgent}'

  StockLookupAgent:
    Type: AWS::BedrockAgent::Agent
    Properties:
      agentName: StockLookupAgent
      foundationModelIdentifier: anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229-v1:0
      agentResourceRoleArn: !GetAtt BedrockAgentServiceRole.Arn
      instruction: >-
        You are a helpful stock price assistant. For any stock price query, use the getStockPrice action with the stock symbol parameter to retrieve the current price.
        Always handle stock-related queries exclusively via the custom getStockPrice action and provide natural language responses based on action results.

  StockPriceActionGroup:
    Type: AWS::BedrockAgent::AgentActionGroup
    Properties:
      agentId: !Ref StockLookupAgent
      actionGroupName: StockPriceActions
      actionGroupExecutor:
        Lambda: !GetAtt GetStockPriceLambda.Arn
      apiSchema: |
        openapi: 3.0.0
        info:
          title: Stock Price API
          version: 1.0.0
        paths:
          /getStockPrice:
            post:
              requestBody:
                required: true
                content:
                  application/json:
                    schema:
                      type: object
                      required:
                        - symbol
                      properties:
                        symbol:
                          type: string
                          description: Stock ticker symbol
              responses:
                200:
                  description: Successful response
                  content:
                    application/json:
                      schema:
                        type: object
                        properties:
                          stockSymbol:
                            type: string
                          price:
                            type: number
      actionGroupState: ENABLED
    DependsOn:
      - BedrockInvokeLambdaPermission

Outputs:
  BedrockAgentId:
    Description: The ID of the Bedrock Agent
    Value: !Ref StockLookupAgent
  BedrockAgentArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Bedrock Agent
    Value: !GetAtt StockLookupAgent.AgentArn
  GetStockPriceLambdaArn:
    Description: The ARN of the Lambda function
    Value: !GetAtt GetStockPriceLambda.Arn
  StockPriceActionGroupId:
    Description: The ID of the Agent Action Group
    Value: !Ref StockPriceActionGroup
